Name: Beitild
description: Beitild is a Nord miner who owns Iron-Breaker Mine in Dawnstar. She is married to Leigelf, owner of Quicksilver Mine, though their feud has caused them to live in separate houses.
canonical_lines: Drafted into a war, how could my life get worse? | I'm really not in the mood. State your business, or take your leave. | I'm busy, and you're bothering me. So go away. | And let me guess, that someone is my so-called husband Leigelf? Well the feeling's mutual. | I've a mine to run, so if you'll excuse me... | My husband Leigelf is dead. I... I never thought I would miss that oaf so much.

Name: Brina Merilis
description: Brina Merilis is a Nord warrior who owns a house in Dawnstar. She is a retired Legion legate and fought in the Great War, and her former subordinate Horik Halfhand still follows her around at all times.
canonical_lines: The Jarl and I have our disagreements. | The Jarl and I have our disagreements. Sorry if you had to overhear one of them. | I wasn't born in Skyrim, but when I served in the Legion this land became my home. | Then by my right as Jarl, I grant you a title to the land. | Your man Horik is wearing his old Legion armor. What should I make of that? | This isn't over. I catch you sending one letter to General Tullius, I'll have you both executed.

Name: Horik Halfhand
description: Horik Halfhand, a Nord warrior, is a retired Legionnaire, and is undyingly loyal to his former commander, Brina Merilis, even after retirement. He proudly dons his old Legion armor despite the displeasure it causes Skald, the Stormcloak-allied Jarl of the Pale.
canonical_lines: I've been in the Legion all my life. I'm content to serve. | What's to say? I was born on a farm, joined the Legion when I came of age, and I've served you ever since. | No. Can't say there was. My parents died when I was young. You and the Legion have been my only family since. | I'm fine, Horik. I just... are you worried about this war? | Just like old times, huh Horik? You and me fighting in a war over some forsaken scrap of land. | I don't think that's needed, Horik. It's the same strategy we used for every major defense during the Great War. It'll serve just as well now.

Name: Dawnstar Guard
description: Dawnstar Guards are guards who act as the military and police force of Dawnstar. These guards serve under Jarl Skald.

Name: Babette
description: Babette is a Breton vampire with a youthful appearance, who works as an assassin for the Dark Brotherhood. Despite her appearance, Babette is the oldest member of the Dark Brotherhood's Falkreath sanctuary.
canonical_lines: It's as rewarding as it is dangerous. Let's see what I can show you. | I could brew some potions for you. Or train you in Alchemy. | What do you hope to find? Sweets and my dolly? Or maybe some of my spare Nightshade? | In truth? It was so easy, I feel a bit guilty. Once again, the sweet, innocent child earned more trust than was wise. | You give me too much credit. For how could I fail? I am, after all, just a little girl. What threat could I possibly pose? He he he he he. | I am the perfect weapon. My innocent, childish form grants me nearly unrestricted access. Poison or a good bite usually takes care of the rest.

Name: Cicero
description: Cicero is an Imperial assassin and Keeper of the Dark Brotherhood. As Keeper, he is responsible for caring for the Night Mother's body and casket.
canonical_lines: He said I was transporting weapons! For the war! In mother's coffin! He made me... open it! Indignity! Sacrilege! | By Sithis, this ends now! Back away, fool! Whatever you've been planning is over! Are you all right? I heard the commotion. Who was Cicero talking to? Where's the accomplice? Reveal yourself, traitor! | ...the High King's court needs a jester... But not me. No, not Cicero. The Fool of Hearts is busy enough, thank you very much... | Agh! Bother and befuddle! Stuck here! Stuck! My mother, my poor mother. Unmoving. At rest, but too still! | That Cicero feller? Hmph. Tell me something I don't know. Crazy fool's already asked me about five times. Seems he's not satisfied with my answer. Why can't he just leave us alone? | What? And just who in Mara's name are you, anyway? Hmm? Come here, telling me my business. And for what? To help a... a... a fool!

Name: Dark Brotherhood Initiate
description: One is a Nord female found in the main room with Nazir, usually cooking. The other is a Nord male found in the living quarters, often reading.
canonical_lines: I am yours to command. | How may I serve you, my Listener? | Ready when you need me, Listener. | I command you to accompany me. | I am honored to be chosen. | But you already have a traveling companion. I fear I would just get in the way.

Name: Nazir
description: Nazir is a Redguard assassin and a member of the Dark Brotherhood. He will offer you contracts upon joining the Dark Brotherhood.
canonical_lines: blood is a shade of crimson I can scarce describe | Of course she is. I hear the mining business is extremely cutthroat. And those hours... they're murder. | I could do this all day. | What can you tell me about yourself? | Ah, well, I'm Redguard, as I'm sure you've noticed. Though not like you. Hmph. No, definitely not like you. | Does she? Listen, brother/sister... Astrid is my mistress, and I worship the ground she walks on. But this Cicero business has her a bit... paranoid.

Name: Fruki
description: Fruki is a Nord miner who works in the Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: I work in the mine, just like everyone else. | It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town. | Listen to your friend, Fruki. They are just dreams, my dear. I assure you that it is quite normal. | It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you! | Everyone, please. I'm doing what I can to end these nightmares. In the meantime all I ask is you remain strong and put your trust in Lady Mara. | I... I will. Thank you...

Name: Irgnir
description: Irgnir is a Nord miner who works for Beitild at the Iron-Breaker Mine in Dawnstar. She is one of many Dawnstar citizens being plagued by nightmares, and if you speak to her, she will insist that the dreams are real.
canonical_lines: These dreams are real I tell you. Real! | I'm just one of the miners. I don't want any trouble. | You should speak to the Jarl if you need something, stranger. | It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town. | Listen to your friend, Fruki. They are just dreams, my dear. I assure you that it is quite normal. | It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you!

Name: Bodil
description: Bodil is a Nord miner who works under Beitild at Iron-Breaker Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: Dawnstar's got its problems, but as long as the ore is good, I'll stay. | Here to dig. That's all.

Name: Gjak
description: Gjak is a Nord miner who lives in Dawnstar and works at Iron-Breaker Mine. He mines the iron ore for Beitild all day long.
canonical_lines: Been working in Iron-Breaker since I was a boy. | Iron's a good, stout metal. A fine thing for a Nord to dig.

Name: Karl
description: Karl is a Nord miner working in and around Iron-Breaker Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: Drafted into a war, how could my life get worse? | Can't sleep well no matter how much drink I put in me. | I'm no one special, just a miner who swings a pickaxe for his drinking money. | Beitild thinks I drink on the job. Well, what does it matter if I do? Huh? | Keep at it. We need to work twice as hard now that fat-headed Leigelf has declared war! | We're at war with Leigelf? Isn't he your husband?

Name: Leigelf
description: Leigelf is a Nord miner who owns the Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar. He is married to Beitild, the owner of Iron-Breaker Mine.
canonical_lines: Quicksilver Mine is the best mine in Dawnstar, and you can tell those Iron-Breaker miners I said so. | If it's about the mine, I'm all ears. | My wife Beitild is dead. Can't say I miss that old sabre cat. | What is it? I haven't had much sleep. | If you don't mind digging, I own the Quicksilver Mine. It's a better life than working in that damned Iron-Breaker Mine with all those milk drinkers. | Brina Merilis came in with the whole damn Legion and deposed Skald. Couldn't have happened to a better man.

Name: Frida
description: Frida is an elderly apothecary who runs The Mortar and Pestle in Dawnstar. Years ago, her husband died while searching for the Ring of Pure Mixtures and she will ask you to finish what he started.
canonical_lines: Seems Brina Merilis and the Legion came and now she's Jarl. That's a relief. I don't like the fighting, but Brina is the woman for the job. | Let me know if you come down with the Rattles. | No. I don't have anything for bad dreams, so don't ask. | Silus keeps filling his house with those Mythic Dawn things. Creepy, I tell you. | Frost took my husband years ago. He was a good man. | How kind. At my age, I've certainly learned how to spend wisely.

Name: Alesan
description: Alesan is a Redguard child who lives in Dawnstar. He makes money by bringing food to the miners of Quicksilver Mine and Iron-Breaker Mine.
canonical_lines: I'm late! Gotta run! | Whew! I'm worn out. | I'm running food and supplies to the miners. Don't pay much, but they let me sleep by the fire in the inn most nights. | Sorry! Gotta run! | One side, comin' through! | Move it, move it!

Name: Harlaug
description: Harlaug is a Nord warrior and the ferryman in Dawnstar. He wears farm clothes, a pair of boots, and carries an iron war axe.
canonical_lines: I can take you to any port on the coast. | May not look like much, but my boat can get you there faster than walking. | You just enjoy the fresh air and leave the rowing to me. | Ah, Solitude. Best port in Skyrim. You should try the Spiced Mead while you're there. | I'll take you as far as I can, but I'm not hanging around and it's gonna cost you extra. | I understand. Climb on in and let's get this over with.

Name: Irine
description: Irine is a Dark Elf traveler who can be found wandering around Dawnstar, close to the Windpeak Inn. She is named in Azarain's Journal as a possible member of a Daedric cult due to the fact that she seems to know more about alchemy than the proprietor of The Mortar and Pestle.

Name: Rustleif
description: Rustleif is a Nord blacksmith living in Dawnstar. He and his wife Seren are expecting a child soon and because of her Redguard heritage he will ask you to bring him a book of Redguard lore called Night Falls on Sentinel.
canonical_lines: I'm just worried about raising a child in the middle of this war of yours. | War of mine? It's not my war, Seren! | Your people's war, I mean. The Nords. What kind of life would we be giving our little one if we stayed here? | I work steel, weapons mostly. | I trained in Hammerfell during my journeyman years. Redguard smiths are second to none. | I can't believe Silus is collecting Mythic Dawn artifacts. Right here in Dawnstar, no less.

Name: Seren
description: Seren is a Redguard blacksmith living in Dawnstar with her husband Rustleif. They run the town's forge out of their home.
canonical_lines: I'm just worried about raising a child in the middle of this war of yours. | War of mine? It's not my war, Seren! | Your people's war, I mean. The Nords. What kind of life would we be giving our little one if we stayed here? | Gods I'm so tired. | I married Rustleif when he was in Hammerfell, apprenticing under my father. | The only thing I dislike about my husband's homeland is the cold. Why is it always so cold?

Name: Silus Vesuius
description: Silus Vesuius, an Imperial destruction mage, is a citizen of Dawnstar and the curator of the Museum of the Mythic Dawn, which is just a few artifacts and objects relating to the Mythic Dawn in display cases inside his home. The reason he created the museum is because he is a part of the family bloodline which was a part of the Mythic Dawn, a cult which attempted to bring the Daedric Prince Mehrunes Dagon to Tamriel, during the Oblivion Crisis 200 years earlier.
canonical_lines: Yes. My collection of artifacts from a group that toppled an Empire. Why don't you come in? You can browse the displays, and we can talk. I have a job you look perfect for. | Why should I hide from it? This is my family's legacy! | And here comes my first visitor. The Museum of the Mythic Dawn is open, friend. | And here you are. I hope you've found the museum to your liking. | And here you are. Good. Come in, browse the display, and let's talk. I have a job you look perfect for. | Your loss, but if you change your mind, I'll be here.

Name: Captain Wayfinder
description: Captain Wayfinder, a Nord rogue, recently inherited the Sea Squall from his late mother and named himself captain, despite an obvious lack of experience. The ship is currently docked in Dawnstar and is inhabited by Wayfinder and his small crew.
canonical_lines: Everyone thinks I'm too young to be a ship's captain, but I'm going to prove them wrong. | I'm good with stars and charts, but I admit I've got some things to learn about leading men. | I inherited the ship when my mother passed away. She spent her life on the water, and now I do, too. | That's the first bit of good news I've had since I set sail a year ago. Here's your cut. | I don't buy all that talk about ship captains having to be stern and strict. I want my crewmen to enjoy their work. | Sailors are what happened to them. They got drunk and ended up losing the merchandise in some cave. If you're not afraid of a little exploring, I'll pay good gold to get those salts.

Name: Guthrum
description: Guthrum is an aging Nord ranger who resides in Dawnstar aboard the permanently docked ship, The Sea Squall.
canonical_lines: I plan to spend all the days I got left on the water. It's where I belong. | I been a sailor for so long, I could navigate these rivers an' seas blindfolded. | Once sailing gets in your blood, it don't get out. | Cap'n Wayfinder's as green as seaweed, but he's learnin'.

Name: Ravam Verethi
description: Ravam Verethi is a Dark Elf rogue living aboard The Sea Squall in Dawnstar. Though he works for Captain Wayfinder, he is less than pleased with the hierarchy and disrespectfully calls the captain a boy.
canonical_lines: Not a day goes by that I don't think about finding a new ship. I guess it's easier just to stay put. | I could run this ship better than that boy who calls himself a captain. Maybe one day I'll do something about it. | The captain inherited the Sea Squall from his mother when she died. Maybe I can inherit the ship if he dies... | I don't like taking orders from a boy, but I need the gold.

Name: Bulfrek
description: Bulfrek is a Nord citizen who is in the service of Jarl Skald the Elder. He works in the White Hall in Dawnstar, where he can often be found sweeping the floor, making comments about his dislike for Skald under his breath.
canonical_lines: Jarl gets booted from Dawnstar, and I'm still stuck cleaning up the dirt. | What do you want, Imperial? Ain't my life hard enough? | Well, I was thinking sir, with the war going on and all. Maybe, I could enlist? Fight the Imperials? | Yes, my Jarl. We could hardly waste anyone else's precious time on such a tedious task. | By the Divines, I'm tired. | There's no honor in being a Jarl's servant. No Sovngarde waits for dust cleaners.

Name: Frorkmar Banner-Torn
description: Frorkmar Banner-Torn is a Nord soldier and commander of the Stormcloaks who can be found in Dawnstar. He is usually in The White Hall or upstairs sleeping in the barracks.

Name: Gregor
description: Gregor is a Nord warrior found in the White Hall in Dawnstar. He becomes your personal housecarl when you have earned the title of a thane in the Pale.
canonical_lines: I'm with you, Thane. | I await your command, Thane. | I'll wait for you here. | As you command, Thane. I'll wait at the White Hall in Dawnstar until you need me again. | As you command, Thane. I'll guard until you return. | What is it, Thane?

Name: Skald
description: Skald is an elderly Nord and the initial Jarl of Dawnstar in the Pale. A militant supporter of the Stormcloak rebellion and fiercely loyal to its leader, Ulfric Stormcloak, he will be overthrown if the Imperial Legion prevails, and replaced by Brina Merilis.
canonical_lines: The only reason dragons are attacking is because Talos is angry with us for turning our backs on him. As soon as we drive the Empire out of Skyrim, the dragons will vanish. Mark my words. | Why are you speaking to me, Imperial? | The Jarl and I have our disagreements. Sorry if you had to overhear one of them | Your man Horik is wearing his old Legion armor. What should I make of that? | This isn't over. I catch you sending one letter to General Tullius, I'll have you both executed. | Skald, I've been meaning to ask you for a leave of absence. I wish to return to High Rock until this war is over.

Name: Jod
description: Jod, a Nord warrior, is the captain of the guard in Dawnstar. He is also the housecarl of Jarl Skald.
canonical_lines: I served in the Great War against the Thalmor. I remember how bravely a Legionnaire can fight. | Jarl Skald is upset over the loss of Dawnstar. I'll admit, it's less I have to worry about. | If we win. This war is going to drag on for years. I can feel it. We need to prepare for a long struggle ahead. | My Jarl, I have concerns about the safety of Dawnstar. | I won't have you rob our soldiers of their chance to drive out the Empire. I'm done discussing this, Jod. | The Jarl is... tired. Be mindful of that.

Name: Madena
description: Madena, a Breton destruction mage, is a citizen of Dawnstar and serves as the court wizard to the Jarl of Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: I had hoped life would be simpler here, but war seems to find a way of following me. | I served in the Great War as a Legion battlemage. I've no desire to go back. | If you can call it that. The Jarl can make all the demands in the world, I'm not setting one foot on the battlefield. I cut enough lives short in the Great War. I'm not going to do it again. | Skald, I've been meaning to ask you for a leave of absence. I wish to return to High Rock until this war is over. | Yes, that's exactly what I'm asking. I'm not a Nord, I'm a Breton, and I have no wish to fight this war. | I told you before, Skald, I have no interest in taking sides in this war. I've no desire to be killed.

Name: Abelone
description: Abelone is a Nord citizen who lives and works at the Windpeak Inn in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: I work for the Windpeak Inn. You should head on inside. | Thoring runs the inn. Speak to him.

Name: Alding
description: Alding is a Nord warrior. Along with Gjuk and Irlof, he forms the crew of Blood Horker Captain Stig Salt-Plank.
canonical_lines: Just... leave me alone! I've brought your mead, now drink it and shut your filthy mouths. | You beasts are the worst. | Come now, dearie, surely we aren't all that bad. | Oh, we've got other things in mind for our mouths, sweetie.

Name: Erandur
description: Erandur, once known as Casimir, is a Dark Elf priest of Mara investigating the nightmares plaguing Dawnstar. While investigating, you will be directed to Erandur, who is also looking into the problem.
canonical_lines: I've heard Riften's home to the worst Skyrim has to offer. I hope we don't run into any trouble while we're here. | After running from Nightcaller Temple, I wandered Skyrim for years until I was taken in by a priest of Mara who lived in Morthal. | I've been enjoying this journey with you. Not for the wealth we've accumulated, but just carry Mara's will to every corner of Skyrim. | It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town. | Listen to your friend, Fruki. They are just dreams, my dear. I assure you that it is quite normal. | It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you!

Name: Gjuk
description: Gjuk is a Nord warrior. Along with Alding and Irlof, he forms the crew of Blood Horker Captain Stig Salt-Plank.

Name: Irlof
description: Irlof is a Nord warrior. Along with Alding and Gjuk, he forms the crew of Blood Horker Captain Stig Salt-Plank.

Name: Karita
description: Karita is a Nord warrior, and a pilgrim encountered in the 7000 steps that lead to High Hrothgar. She is sitting and meditating in front of the fourth etched tablet.
canonical_lines: Just a pilgrim. I'd prefer to leave it at that, if you don't mind. | I was just outside Ivarstead when it happened. It's an exciting moment. Nothing like this has happened in centuries. | Walking the Steps. Meditating on the emblems. I make this trip every few years. | Keep an eye out for wolves if you're headed up the path to High Hrothgar.

Name: Stig Salt-Plank
description: Stig Salt-Plank, a Nord warrior, is a pirate captain and a member of the Blood Horkers. He tells you about how the war is good for business because the guards are too busy.
canonical_lines: Just... leave me alone! I've brought your mead, now drink it and shut your filthy mouths. | Heard of them? I've been captaining a crew for 'em well on nine years now. What's it to you? | Aye, the war keeps the Empire and the locals too busy to worry about us. Haldyn calls it "our golden age." | Well I can't just tell that to any skeever that washes up. From the look of you, I'm guessing you're more looking to cause some trouble for the Horkers. | It would be my pleasure. | You beasts are the worst.

Name: Thoring
description: Thoring, a Nord food vendor, is the owner and proprietor of the Windpeak Inn. He is the father to the inn's bard, Karita.
canonical_lines: I'm sorry. My mind was just somewhere else. Did you need a room? Drink? | It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town. | Listen to your friend, Fruki. They are just dreams, my dear. I assure you that it is quite normal. | It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you! | Everyone, please. I'm doing what I can to end these nightmares. In the meantime all I ask is you remain strong and put your trust in Lady Mara. | I... I will. Thank you...

Name: Vereth
description: Vereth is a High Elf patron of the Windpeak Inn in Dawnstar. He is named in Azarain's Journal as a possible member of a Daedric cult due to the fact that he complains of the cold but is resolute in remaining in Dawnstar.

Name: Borgny
description: Borgny is a Nord miner, and one of the many people who work in Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: Plenty of iron to dig. | Mining's an honest trade. No real tricks to it.

Name: Edith
description: Edith, a Nord miner, is an employee of Leigelf and works in the depths of Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: Quicksilver ore is rare. Worth digging.

Name: Harald
description: Harald is a Nord miner who works inside Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar. He is named in Azarain's Journal as a possible member of a Daedric cult, although it is eventually revealed that he is a vampire's thrall, under the control of Fenrik.

Name: Lond
description: Lond is a Nord miner and is one of the many workers at the Quicksilver Mine in Dawnstar.
canonical_lines: If I get any rest soon, I'll count myself richer than a king. | I mine. Work the smelter. Ain't much else to tell. | Been mining all my life. Quicksilver is as much my home as anywhere. | If you don't mind me saying, Leigelf. You're working too hard. Go home. | Never. Not until we turn this mine around, drive Beitild out of business, and force her to apologize to me for everything she's done! | I don't want to talk about it.

Name: Indara Caerellia
description: Indara Caerellia is an Imperial who lives at Corpselight Farm in Falkreath with her husband, Mathies. Their only daughter, Lavinia, was recently killed by Sinding, and husband Mathies will ask you to investigate in the quest Ill Met By Moonlight.
canonical_lines: I knew he was troubled, but one of the Thalmor? I wish I could say I did not believe it. Thank you for telling me. | My husband and I tend Corpselight Farm. | How could people see all the graves in Falkreath and still want to make war? | I suppose so. Seems like it was just turning summer yesterday. | Falkreath is a hard place and tending a farm here is thankless work. | Mathies is a kind and wise man. The Nords could use more like him. So could the Imperials.

Name: Mathies
description: Mathies is a Nord farmer who runs Corpselight Farm in the city of Falkreath with his wife, Indara Caerellia. They can initially be found in the Falkreath graveyard mourning their daughter, Lavinia, who was recently killed by Sinding.
canonical_lines: This war isn't needed. Imperials like my wife can be hard to handle but we Nords could work with them. I should know. | I don't know if the war is Arkay's will or man's, but it's none of my doings. | I knew he was troubled, but one of the Thalmor? I wish I could say I did not believe it. Thank you for telling me. | I just don't understand what kind of a man does that. | Indara and I like to keep to ourselves and run our farm. | My wife, Indara, has a gift with animals. It makes her a better farmer than anyone I've ever seen.

Name: Arcturus
description: Arcturus, an Imperial, is part of the group of Penitus Oculatus agents sent to the Dark Brotherhood Sanctuary during the quest Death Incarnate.

Name: Arnbjorn
description: Arnbjorn is a werewolf assassin, former Companion, and a member of the Dark Brotherhood. He is also Astrid's husband.
canonical_lines: Let me guess - Astrid failed to mention I'm her husband? She has a tendency to do that. Doesn't want the others thinking she plays favorites. | You're part of a family now, hamshank. I trust you... you trust me. Got it? | Don't take offense to the nicknames, morsel. I'm a werewolf. Hard not to think of you as a snack. | You're putting your hand... in my pocket? Have you gone complete cracked? | I am not adorable, it was not funny, and he wasn't a merchant. He was a Khajiit monk, a master of the Whispering Fang style. But now he's dead... and I have a new loincloth. | Well, well. It's raw meat. Oh, my beautiful wife has told me all about you.

Name: Astrid
description: Astrid is a Nord assassin, the leader of the last remaining Dark Brotherhood Sanctuary in Tamriel, and the wife of former Companion Arnbjorn. She also initiates many of the quests in the Dark Brotherhood questline.
canonical_lines: By Sithis, this ends now! Back away, fool! Whatever you've been planning is over! Are you all right? I heard the commotion. Who was Cicero talking to? Where's the accomplice? Reveal yourself, traitor! | Am I to take your silence as acceptance? Then you know where we stand. Make your kill, and we're square. Repayment of your debt is but a discreet knife thrust away. | Ah, at last! I hope you found the place all right. | But make no mistake. I am the leader of this Sanctuary. My word is law. Are we clear on that point? | Ah, there you are. Good, I was done speaking with that muttering fool anyway. We've got some business to discuss. | Ah, you're back. So, how went your first real contract? A bit more exciting than what Nazir's been offering, I'd wager.

Name: Festus Krex
description: Festus Krex is an elderly mage found in the Dark Brotherhood sanctuary west of Falkreath.
canonical_lines: Yes, yes. I'm your brother and I'm supposed to greet you respectfully. So "hello." There, satisfied? | Go, incinerate some poor bastard for me. | I am not adorable, it was not funny, and he wasn't a merchant. He was a Khajiit monk, a master of the Whispering Fang style. But now he's dead... and I have a new loincloth. | Yes, yes, you're the new Family member. Let's make this easy - consider me the cranky old uncle nobody talks to. You go your way, I'll go mine. | Achh... Thank you, dear. You are most kind. The jester's cut feels as bad as it looks, I'm afraid. | I'll admit, even I'm having a hard time disagreeing with you...

Name: Gabriella
description: Gabriella is a Dark Elf assassin who works for the Dark Brotherhood.
canonical_lines: Does death not come to us all? Is it not a certainty? I am, therefore, honored to be doom's herald. To play some part in a being's inevitable end. | In the Dark Brotherhood, I found acceptance, love, and my life's true purpose. | Without the Night Mother, there is no Dark Brotherhood. The Matron deserves our unwavering support and respect. Though I admit, I find her Keeper a bit too exuberant for my liking. | I am not adorable, it was not funny, and he wasn't a merchant. He was a Khajiit monk, a master of the Whispering Fang style. But now he's dead... and I have a new loincloth. | New brother/sister. May I offer my most sincere welcome to our Family. | You certainly have a strange energy about you. I look forward to following your progress.

Name: Veezara
description: Veezara is an Argonian assassin who works for the Dark Brotherhood. He is not a quest giver, and usually hangs around the Sanctuary, either resting or training.
canonical_lines: Me, I have been part of the Dark Brotherhood from the day I first hatched. I am a Shadowscale, you see. Born under the sign of the Shadow. | I serve Astrid, and this Sanctuary. Life is simple, and good. | I've hardly anything worth pickpocketing... | I am not adorable, it was not funny, and he wasn't a merchant. He was a Khajiit monk, a master of the Whispering Fang style. But now he's dead... and I have a new loincloth. | Welcome, my brother/sister. Welcome to our Sanctuary. You have made the right choice, joining us, I assure you. | Astrid ordered me to keep an eye on you. Figured you could use a hand when the chaos erupted. I'll try and hold them off as best I can. You get back to the Sanctuary!

Name: Delacourt
description: Delacourt is a Breton rogue and the resident bard of Falkreath. He spends his entire day at Dead Man's Drink, either entertaining the customers or sitting for a meal.
canonical_lines: Perhaps one day, I'll write a song about you! | I'm a bard, trained at the Bards College in Solitude. Wanderers like you should think about applying. | Keep in song in your heart to ward off the gloom.

Name: Narri
description: Narri is a Nord citizen who works at the Dead Man's Drink, an inn located in Falkreath. She works for Valga Vinicia.
canonical_lines: The impertinence! You never would have talked to me like that when I was Jarl. | I think the war is just an excuse. If it does end there will be a new reason and a new place. | I've half a mind to ask if you'll take me on one of your adventures, but I can't just leave Valga on her own. | Anything I can get you? | Can I get you a drink? | I wish I could afford to pay you both, Narri. I really do.

Name: Valdr
description: Valdr is a Nord and the leader of a group of bear hunters from Falkreath. According to concerned Falkreath citizens, people started disappearing in the wilderness not too long ago, including Valdr and his men, who were last seen heading north.
canonical_lines: Not sure how much longer I can hold out here. | I really got myself into it this time. | Hello? You! Over here! Please, I need help! | Please! I'm not sure I'll make it on my own. | Thank Kynareth for you, stranger. I'd almost given up hope of walking away from here. | Name's Valdr. I hunt out of Falkreath.

Name: Valga Vinicia
description: Valga Vinicia is an Imperial and innkeeper of the Dead Man's Drink in Falkreath. She has 100 gold available to barter with and buys food.
canonical_lines: I escaped fighting in Cyrodiil only to have it track me down again in Skyrim. | The way this war is going you'll soon have plenty of veterans like me to buy drinks. | In Falkreath if I don't know it, it's not worth knowing. | I wouldn't complain if we could string together a few sunny days now and then. | The people of Skyrim don't like magic much, so about the only place you're likely to find a teacher is the College of Winterhold. | You hear any juicy gossip in town, be sure to share it with me!

Name: Dengeir of Stuhn
description: Dengeir of Stuhn is a Nord, and thane of Falkreath under his nephew, Jarl Siddgeir, an Imperial loyalist. He shares his home in the city with his brother Thadgeir, and his servant and confidant Tekla.
canonical_lines: I might be old, but I haven't forgotten that a Jarl's first duty is to look after his people. | I was Jarl once. But I was encouraged to step down when I took sides with the Stormcloaks. It was an Imperial plot, I tell you! | Mark my words, I'll be Jarl again someday! | The war has changed Falkreath, even our neighbors can be our enemies. | If you're sympathetic to the Empire, you'd be wise to put Falkreath far behind you. | My nephew has always been handed things, even the title of Jarl.

Name: Tekla
description: Tekla is a Nord citizen of Falkreath, where she works as a maid to Dengeir of Stuhn, who believes she is spying on him for his nephew, Jarl Siddgeir. She is Solaf's girlfriend, and Narri's sister.
canonical_lines: I think the war is just an excuse. If it does end there will be a new reason and a new place. | Try not to judge Falkreath too harshly, visitor – the war has been hard on us. | I'm sorry, I should really go now. | I can't really help you, I'm just Dengeir's maid. | From maid to Steward, I can hardly believe it. I hope I'm up to the task. | Don't let my brother get to you, Tekla. You're doing a fine job around here.

Name: Thadgeir
description: Thadgeir is a Nord warrior from Falkreath who, like Tekla, is living in his brother Dengeir's house, the former Jarl of Falkreath. The current jarl, Siddgeir, is their nephew.
canonical_lines: Skyrim's history of war is well documented here in Falkreath's graveyard. | Don't let my brother get to you, Tekla. You're doing a fine job around here. | Most of my friends are buried here. | Falkreath was once full of wanderers and warriors like yourself. Those were better days. | My brother Dengeir can be... difficult. Take his words with a grain of salt. | Unless you intend to bury someone this isn't the place you're looking for, traveler.

Name: Falkreath Guard
description: Falkreath Guards are guards who act as the military and police force of Falkreath. These guards serve under Jarl Siddgeir.
canonical_lines: I don't know really. | The blacksmith is offering a reward for a dog he saw on the road. I was hoping you'd seen it. I guess I'll stay on the lookout. Keep your nose clean while you're here outsider. | Did you see a Dog out there? | No, this was a specific one.

Name: Sinding
description: Sinding, a Nord warrior, is a werewolf who was jailed for killing Lavinia, Mathies' and Indara Caerellia's daughter in Falkreath. Speaking to him in the Falkreath Barracks begins the Daedric quest Ill Met By Moonlight.
canonical_lines: I just don't understand what kind of a man does that. | Believe me, it wasn't anything I ever intended to do. I just... lost control. I tried to tell them, but none of them believe me. It's all on account of this blasted ring. | A little girl is dead because of me. | I don't suppose there's a point in keeping the secret if I'm going to die in here anyway. I'm sure you've heard of men who shift to beasts under the influence of the moons. | Do you not know the Daedric Lord of the Hunt? He revels in the chase, and also gave the 'gift' of lycanthropy to mortals. A powerful force, not to be crossed. As I learned too late. | Oh my. You would do this for me? Here, take it. I don't want anything to do with this wretched thing anymore.

Name: Zaria
description: Zaria is a Redguard who immigrated to Skyrim in order to explore her passion for poisons more freely. She fell in love with Falkreath and named her store Grave Concoctions, where she also lives.
canonical_lines: The way this war is going you'll soon have plenty of veterans like me to buy drinks. | Someone new, perhaps someone looking for me to mix something up for them? | If either these Nords or Imperials had some red in their blood this war would be over. | Call upon me if I can be of any service. | I'm grateful for your efforts. Here, take this. | Maybe you can help me.

Name: Bolund
description: Bolund is a Nord warrior that owns and operates Falkreath's lumber mill. He lives in the general store Gray Pine Goods with his brother Solaf.
canonical_lines: I can't believe we let provincials like you wander Skyrim. | A hearty welcome to Falkreath! All of Skyrim's true sons are welcome here! | Stay out of my way, boot. | You'll find my brother Solaf and I are the only true Nords in Falkreath. | Falkreath is where people go to die. We could be fighting, taking back Nord land! | Falkreath is our home, a place where we have good jobs under a good Jarl. Until the war comes to us we stay put.

Name: Solaf
description: Solaf is a Nord lumberjack and the proprietor of Gray Pine Goods. He lives there with his brother Bolund who runs the Falkreath lumber mill.
canonical_lines: Well met. Unlike my brother, I've no dislike of strangers. Met lots of 'em while I was a Stormcloak. | Now, maybe I don't pick up a blade in Ulfric's name no more, but I still hold with his ideals. Skyrim is Nord land, and we ought to rule it. We don't need no help from the Empire on that count. | Can I get you something? | I was once, but not any more. I was wounded in a skirmish up near Windhelm. This was years ago, mind you. | Falkreath is where people go to die. We could be fighting, taking back Nord land! | Falkreath is our home, a place where we have good jobs under a good Jarl. Until the war comes to us we stay put.

Name: Kust
description: Kust is a Nord monk from Falkreath, where he tends to the biggest graveyard in Skyrim. He is the assistant to town priest Runil who tends the shrine to Arkay, and they both live in the Hall of the Dead.
canonical_lines: Strangers like you bring war. I've seen enough war. | I knew he was troubled but one of the Thalmor? I wish I could say I did not believe it. Thank you for telling me. | Show respect while you're here and you and I will be fine. | Few want to be reminded of mortality in a time of war, Kust. | I knew something was up. I'll make sure he doesn't disrespect this place anymore. Honesty is a rare thing to find these days. Thank you. | You have the look of a killer.

Name: Runil
description: Runil is a High Elf priest of Arkay, and the keeper of Falkreath's Hall of the Dead.
canonical_lines: I have heard that they [the Thalmor] and their agents are abroad in Skyrim, rooting out worshippers of Talos. I must be sure to keep a low profile. | I came into Arkay's light after the Great War. | I knew he was troubled but one of the Thalmor? I wish I could say I did not believe it. Thank you for telling me. | Kust is responsible for the cemetery here in Falkreath, I take care of the Shrine. | War is not new to Falkreath. You have only to stand in our cemetery to see that. | Dengeir deserves more respect than his nephew, Jarl Siddgeir, affords him.

Name: Helvard
description: Helvard, a Nord warrior, is the housecarl of Falkreath. He is a target of a Dark Brotherhood contract.
canonical_lines: I protect the Jarl, whoever that might be. | Sir, I will shape them up but with the war on it is unwise to reduce their wages any further. | Right. Well. If you have some kind of official business with the jarl, I'm afraid now's not the time. Go on then. Off with you. | By the love of the Nine, what is it with you sycophants and hangers on? The jarl is busy! And so am I, for that matter. | Falkreath's cemetery reminds us that war is not new here. | Treat the Jarl with respect, and you'll be welcome here.

Name: Siddgeir
description: Siddgeir is the Nord Jarl of Falkreath and an Imperial Legion supporter. He has two uncles, the first of which is Dengeir of Stuhn, the former jarl of Falkreath.
canonical_lines: Sir, I will shape them up but with the war on it is unwise to reduce their wages any further. | I trust you don't presume on our friendship? I am a Jarl, after all. I wouldn't want to appear foolish in front of these people. | Ulfric Stormcloak? The rightful High King? That's bordering on treason, man! Stand up. Stand up, I say! | I don't understand... did you say Ulfric Stormcloak? Fine fellow, although a bit too fond of... I mean, no, of course, I condemn him in the most... | My nephew has always been handed things, even the title of Jarl. | speaks much about the war and the Stormcloaks but he knows who provides.

Name: Legate Skulnar
description: Legate Skulnar is a Nord soldier who can be found in the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath if the Imperials control Falkreath Hold, or at the Falkreath Imperial Camp if the Stormcloaks control the hold.

Name: Nenya
description: Nenya is a High Elf elemental mage who serves as steward to the Jarl of Falkreath. She served under Dengeir of Stuhn and continues to serve for his nephew Siddgeir.
canonical_lines: I'm the Steward here. I serve under Jarl Siddgeir and Jarl Dengeir before him. | For Falkreath and I this is just one more war in a long line. | Siddgeir can sometimes act too quickly but he does listen to Helvard and I. | Ah, excellent. The Jarl was hoping you would be interested. It's a fine property. Well-watered, plentiful stands of timber, beautiful view. | Ah, I see. Well, it's possible that the property will still be available when you amass the necessary funds. | They are only a little late, Jarl. The trade routes are affected by the war, we should give them another day.

Name: Rayya
description: Rayya is a Redguard warrior found in the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath. She becomes your personal housecarl when you have earned the title of Thane in Falkreath Hold.
canonical_lines: I'll wait for you at the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath until you need me again, Thane. | I await your orders, Thane. | Yes, my Thane? Do you need something? | Lead on, my Thane. | I'll stand guard here. | Of course, Thane. How can I be of service?

Name: Lod
description: Lod is a Nord and Falkreath's resident blacksmith. His house is located on the southern part of town.
canonical_lines: Steel's good, but loyalty's better. I'm loyal to Dengeir first and the Empire second. | The war bleeds Skyrim. It bleeds her dry and I think none of us are the better for it. | I can't afford to chase him down but I could use a fierce, loyal beast to keep me company. If you were willing to retrieve him for me I'd give you some fresh meat to attract him out on the road. | Men and women join the war, they travel far on these roads to spill each other's blood. | I asked the gate guards to look for him. | Mathies. I wanted to say I'm sorry about what happened to your girl.

Name: Imedhnain
description: Imedhnain is a Breton food vendor living in Markarth. He works at Arnleif and Sons Trading Company and will take over the shop if Lisbet dies.
canonical_lines: Lisbet handles the customers. I just check the shipments. | I brought in my cousin Cosnach to help me handle shipments. | With Lisbet gone I will be taking care of you. | I'm keeping Arnleif and Sons going as best I can. | I better get back to sorting the dry goods. | Now where did I put that shipment of forks...

Name: Lisbet
description: Lisbet is a Nord and the owner of the Arnleif and Sons Trading Company, a general goods store in Markarth. After her husband's death, she was handed management of the store.
canonical_lines: No, I'm not Arnleif. Yes, I know it's called Arnleif and Sons. | I love hearing Ogmund sing at the inn. He's a true skald. | Imedhnain, I was just comparing the ledgers from last season. | Not too bad, I hope? | He's my cousin. Just give him another chance. Please. | Fine, I won't fire him, but I'm doing this for your sake. Not his.

Name: Captain Aquilius
description: Captain Aquilius is a Redguard bandit who only appears during Hard Answers as you leave Calcelmo's Tower after copying the tablet. If Aicantar is still alive, he will instruct Aquilius to search the building.
canonical_lines: Accidents like this just don't happen. Someone is trying to sabotage my uncle's research. | I...all right. If there is a thief, he won't leave this tower alive. But shouldn't we inform Master Calcelmo? | I'll deal with my uncle. Just...go! Scour this place from top to bottom! | All right men, spread out and search the tower. No telling who - or what - we're dealing with here.

Name: Borkul the Beast
description: Borkul the Beast is an Orc warrior who is found inside Cidhna Mine. He is considered to be the toughest prisoner in the mine and guards the door leading to Forsworn leader Madanach.
canonical_lines: You want to talk to the King in Rags? Fine. But first you got to pay the toll. How about you get me a shiv? Not that I need one, but it's nice to have in case I need to do some "shaving." Ha ha. | A true killer, like me. The gods put us here to fill their halls with souls. You'll fit in fine down here. | Guards brought me in about 12 years ago. Was running a good group of bandits up until then. But these Forsworn. They're nothing like the men I cobbled together. They're real killers. | Prison's not so bad. Less complaints when I kill people. | That's what I was hoping you'd say. | It's been so long since I tasted my own blood. Sour.

Name: Braig
description: Braig is a Breton witchblade, held prisoner in Cidhna Mine. He has been imprisoned longer than anyone else in the mine with the exception of Madanach.
canonical_lines: Fine. Don't tell me. But I know that look in your eyes. Someone who's faced death at the hands of the law. | My daughter is the one who needs your pity. I'm just a poor Forsworn whose only regret is not killing more Nords before I was locked up. | Don't reach for a shiv around me, or we'll both regret it. | Nearly broke my back out in the mines today. Damn Nords should bleed for putting us through this! | Have any skooma? I need to get something from Grisvar. | You make one move towards my skooma, and I shiv you.

Name: Duach
description: Duach is a Breton witchblade held prisoner in Cidhna Mine. It is unknown exactly how long he has been there, but it is believed that it has been around seven years since he has seen daylight.
canonical_lines: Whenever I get out of here, I'm going to go kill a Nord. | You give me one more look, and I cut you open. That Skooma's mine. | Easy there. I didn't mean nothing. Take it. | Damn addicts always stealing from me. Here. I hope you choke on it. | Year seven, I think? Surprised I haven't cut my own throat out by now, but something keeps me going. | I'm a Forsworn. One of our raids went bad, and I got captured. Would've been fine dying for the Reach with my kinsmen, but the Silver-Bloods want their ore mined, so they threw me in here.

Name: Grisvar the Unlucky
description: Grisvar the Unlucky is a Nord thief who has been locked up in Cidhna Mine for life after committing many crimes. He carries two shivs.
canonical_lines: Jarl decided I was too much of a problem. Threw me in here with the Forsworn. | I got locked up one too many times. Now I'm in for life. | I swear, if I ever get out of here, I'm giving up thieving. Really. | First it was 6 months, then a year, then 2 years. Now I'm in for life. | Ah, you want protection? I can get you what you need. Maybe you can do something for me, first? Duach has a bottle of Skooma. Finest distilled Moon Sugar. I'm shaking just thinking about it. | Thank you, friend. Don't worry. I'll have that shiv ready for you.

Name: Madanach
description: Madanach, also known as the King in Rags, is a Breton witchblade and the leader of the Forsworn Rebellion. He once ruled all of The Reach as king, although only for a short time.
canonical_lines: So, my fellow beast, what do you want? Answers about the Forsworn? Revenge for trying to have you killed? | Your freedom? Yes. But even if you were to escape Cidhna Mine, your name would still be stained with all that blood. | Do I? And what about you? What right did you have to meddle in my affairs? Kill my people? Was it worth it? Your truth? | You're one of us now, you see? A slave. The boot of stepping on your throat. Maybe if you understood that, I could help you. | So many say that, at first, until they realize the truth. If you change your mind, speak to Braig. Tell him I sent you. I want you to know how widespread the injustice of Markarth is. | There's a man named Braig inside these mines. Besides me, he's been here the longest. Tell him I sent you. Ask him why he's here. I want you to know how widespread the injustice of Markarth is.

Name: Odvan
description: Odvan is a Breton witchblade who lives in Cidhna Mine.
canonical_lines: I was sent here because someone said I was a Forsworn. | I'm innocent. The Nords framed me. I was nowhere near that murder weapon. | I wonder how grandma Bothela is doing. She's probably worried sick about me. | I can't believe we're finally getting out. | A couple of years? I wasn't a Forsworn when I came, but I joined up when I got in. Easier that way. | Guards say I murdered someone. I was just sleeping off some mead in my aunt's house, but that didn't stop them from arresting me. I don't even know who they said I killed.

Name: Uraccen
description: Uraccen is a Breton witchblade held prisoner in Cidhna Mine. He has been sentenced to life in prison for being a member of the Forsworn.
canonical_lines: A Nord nobleman I served was stabbed in the night. Wasn't me, but I knew I'd be blamed. So I ran. Joined the Forsworn. Started killing. Got caught. Now I'm here. | Innocent? So was I, for the first one. The other murders were all me, though. | Bottles of Moon Sugar. Khajiit use it as a... pick me up. Good way to pass the time. Prisoners smuggle the stuff in. Only currency we have down here. | Because life was better under the old ways. No Nords and their laws. One day, the Forsworn will paint the walls of Markarth in your kinsmen's blood. Best you not be there on that day, Nord. | I left behind my daughter Uaile when I was taken. | How old is my daughter now, I wonder? In prison, you lose track of time.

Name: Adara
description: Adara is the Redguard daughter of Kerah and Endon, who are silversmiths in Markarth. Her brother is Cade, who is off fighting with the Stormcloaks.
canonical_lines: Can I join the Legion when I grow up? | If there's still a Legion left, Adara. I'm sure you'd make a great soldier. Just like your brother. | My daughter Adara is also my apprentice. She's a quick study. | Yes, I have. Adara made the rings herself. She is learning to bend the metal well. | I'm going to be a silversmith one day, like my mother and father. | Being an apprentice is great. I get to swing a hammer at things.

Name: Endon
description: Endon is a Redguard citizen who is usually in the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth. He is the husband of the merchant Kerah and the father of Adara.
canonical_lines: Can I join the Legion when I grow up? | If there's still a Legion left, Adara. I'm sure you'd make a great soldier. Just like your brother. | I work silver, like my father, and his father before him. | My daughter Adara is also my apprentice. She's a quick study. | I prefer working in silver. More skill needed than forging iron or steel. | I have silver to bend.

Name: Kerah
description: Kerah is a Redguard pawnbroker who has a stall in the Markarth marketplace where she sells the silver jewelry made by her husband, Endon. Their daughter, Adara, frequently boasts that she is going to be a silversmith like her parents.
canonical_lines: Can I join the Legion when I grow up? | If there's still a Legion left, Adara. I'm sure you'd make a great soldier. Just like your brother. | I have a necklace that would look lovely on you, or on a... special someone. | Stop by my stall in the market sometime. | I do have one set of bracelets in a style that is popular with the nobility in Sentinel. | They are popular with the nobility there, yes. This particular bracelet is a copy of one worn by a Crown Princess.

Name: Markarth City Guard
description: Markarth City Guards are guards who act as the military and police force of Markarth. These guards serve under Jarl Igmund.
canonical_lines: First time in Markarth, traveler? Take my advice. You see anything, don't get involved. The city guard will take care of it. | Jarl Igmund sits on the Mournful Throne. You can find him in the keep, in the back end of the city inside the mountain. | I said move along. The Forsworn are just a bunch of madmen. We have everything under control. Stay out of it. | You. I've seen you snooping around. Asking questions. Back off. You don't want to know what happens to troublemakers here. | You'll never see the sun again, you hear me? No one escapes Cidhna Mine. No one. | The "problem" is your disrespect for the laws of this land. It's time to face the Jarl's justice.

Name: Bothela
description: Bothela is a Breton apothecary merchant who lives in Markarth. She owns and runs the Hag's Cure with her assistant and friend Muiri.
canonical_lines: I have potions for disease, love sickness, irritating children... | Oh yes... you'll need one of my special brews... | Now you let me know if you need a cure... or anything else. | I have herbs to mix. | Ah, yes. Clever way of keeping that lecher's hands away from her. But you didn't hear that from me. | There's just so much to memorize. How am I supposed to remember what goes where for every single herb?

Name: Muiri
description: Muiri is a Breton apothecary. She grew up in Windhelm with her best friend Nilsine Shatter-Shield.
canonical_lines: Why are you looking at me like that? | The Dark Brotherh... Oh. Oh! I... my goodness, you're really here! The Black Sacrament. It actually worked? | What I need? What I need is for Alain Dufont to die! I want him hunted down and murdered like the dog he is! | Make them all pay for what they've done to me... | I'm Bothela's assistant. She's the one you should talk to if you need an herb or a potion. | I've taken over the Hag's Cure, since Bothela is gone.

Name: Brother Verulus
description: Brother Verulus is an Imperial priest residing in the Hall of the Dead in Markarth. He can initially be found outside of the hall in Understone Keep, having an argument with Thongvor Silver-Blood.
canonical_lines: Typical Imperial lies. First you take away Talos, now you're keeping us from seeing our honored dead? You and the Jarl will answer for any desecration of my ancestors' bodies. | New to Skyrim? I was confused at first, too. The Nords call their mausoleums the Hall of the Dead. It's where people in the city are buried. Fathers. Forefathers. Mothers. Foremothers. | I can't talk about it. Rest assured, the Jarl hears everyone's concerns. You will be able to visit the dead again soon. | All right. I was going to suggest the Jarl hire someone to sort this mess out, anyway. | Then my answer is the Hall of the Dead is closed. By order of the Jarl. Understand? | I'm not hiding anything. It's closed for a reason.

Name: Eola
description: Eola is a Breton nightblade initially found in the Hall of the Dead in Markarth where she reluctantly resides to satisfy a very special hunger. Due to the desecration of the corpses, the hall had to be closed down and you are asked to investigate further, leading to the quest The Taste of Death and an encounter with the Daedric Prince Namira.
canonical_lines: Meet me there. | It's inside Reachcliff Cave. But the dead have stirred from their slumber recently, and I was forced here. Meet me there. We will fight our way to Namira's embrace together. | Very well. But should the hunger call out to you, I'll be waiting outside Reachcliff Cave. | I was hoping you would say that. | Then I'll wait. | Namira grind your bones for my bread!

Name: Daighre
description: Daighre is a Breton miner living in Left Hand Mine, just outside Markarth. She is the mother of Erith.
canonical_lines: I'm the hardest worker in Left Hand. Better than any man. | Most women would rather die than dig, but I have a daughter to raise. | My Erith has her father's eyes. She's all I have left of him. | I'm sorry my daughter gives you so much trouble. | Skaggi tells me that you were bothering him today. Can't you and Torom just play by yourselves? | But mom, it's so boring with just me and Torom. I was just asking Skaggi some questions.

Name: Erith
description: Erith, a Breton child, is the daughter of Daighre. She can be found in Left Hand Mine, just outside Markarth, and is usually in the company of her faithful companion Torom.
canonical_lines: What'cha doing in Left Hand? Do you dig up rocks too, like my mom? | Skaggi tells me that you were bothering him today. Can't you and Torom just play by yourselves? | But mom, it's so boring with just me and Torom. I was just asking Skaggi some questions. | You leave him alone. I don't want to hear Skaggi telling me you've been bothering him again! | I don't know. What'd he look like? | Hope Pavo will be able to go back to his mine soon. Everyone needs a home.

Name: Torom
description: Torom is Erith's pet dog. He can be found in Left Hand Mine, just outside Markarth.
canonical_lines: Have you met Torom? He's the best dog in the Reach.

Name: Adeber
description: Adeber is a Breton miner who works at Left Hand Mine. He isn't really a talker because he is too busy digging out ore.
canonical_lines: I'm one of miners. Plenty of ore to dig up around here. | Don't have much to say to you. Got work.

Name: Ennoc
description: Ennoc is a Breton miner who lives in the Miner's Barracks for the Left Hand Mine in which he works.
canonical_lines: I'm just here to mine. | Got ore to dig.

Name: Willem
description: Willem is a Breton miner who lives in the Miner's Barracks and works in the nearby Left Hand Mine.
canonical_lines: I'm just here to dig. Not much else to talk about. | It's amazing how much work goes into the little things, isn't it?

Name: Gat gro-Shargakh
description: Gat gro-Shargakh is an Orc miner. He and Pavo Attius were the only miners to survive the Forsworn invasion of Kolskeggr Mine.
canonical_lines: Pavo and I had to fight our way out of Kolskeggr. Forsworn killed everyone else. | Don't know what I would have done without Pavo. Man's braver than he admits. | I've never seen Pavo so happy. It's good to be back in Kolskeggr. | Well I'm glad you were there. I don't know how I would have gotten past the Forsworn without you. | Still shaken from all the fighting, my friend. It's been too long since I had to kill someone. | Those Forsworn were fierce fighters. Fiercer than I could have imagined.

Name: Pavo Attius
description: Pavo Attius, an Imperial miner, can initially be found at the Left Hand Mine and will give you the quest Kolskeggr Mine. Once the quest is completed he will move to the mine and will buy gold ore for 50 gold each.
canonical_lines: Was. Forsworn came in the night. Killed everyone. Gat and I are the only ones who escaped. Hopefully Skaggi will send word to the Jarl and something will be done. | Gat and I are the only survivors. | You're telling me. | I'd be grateful. Kolskeggr is my home. But, I wouldn't go there if I were you. There's a whole group of them with axes and magic on their side. You'd never stand a chance. | You drove them off? By yourself? Thank you! We'll head back to work, right away. Take this, it's the least I can do. | Skaggi is in charge, not me.

Name: Skaggi Scar-Face
description: Skaggi Scar-Face is a Nord miner who is in charge of Left Hand Mine, the small mining settlement near Markarth. He is the husband of Sosia Tremellia.
canonical_lines: Gods.... You two head inside and get some rest. I'll send word to the Jarl. | I'm sure Pavo would be grateful, and we'd all rest a little easier. But that's nonsense. You can't handle a group of Forsworn by yourself. If their axes don't get you, their magic will. | I'm in charge of Left Hand Mine. You cause trouble, you answer to me. | Left Hand Mine deals with iron, the perfect metal to dig with a war going on. | That I do. If you want to grab a pickaxe and dig up some iron, feel free. I'll pay for anything you bring me. | I'm sorry my daughter gives you so much trouble.

Name: Sosia Tremellia
description: Sosia Tremellia is an Imperial miner living with her husband Skaggi Scar-Face, the owner of Left Hand Mine south of Markarth.
canonical_lines: You should speak with my husband. Skaggi runs everything. | Kolskeggr, overrun with Forsworn, what next? | Did you hear that? Pavo was driven out of his mine. Almost everyone is dead. | What if the Forsworn come here? We aren't safe.

Name: Kaie
description: Kaie, a Breton nightblade, is a member of the Forsworn who meets with Madanach and the Cidhna Mine escapees and gives them their equipment just before leaving the Markarth Ruins. She will follow Madanach, fight alongside the Forsworn, and run all the way to Druadach Redoubt where she will settle down.
canonical_lines: Madanach. I've brought what you asked for. | Good work. Get ready while I have a word with our favorite outsider. | It wasn't easy getting all your things. A few guards had to have their throats slit.

Name: Banning
description: Banning is a Breton ranger who lives with Cedran at the Markarth Stables selling war dogs. A dog named Vigilance can be bought from him for 500 gold.
canonical_lines: You buy a war dog from me? There's a reason why my hounds are so eager to bite into people. | A war dog is good company and good protection. | I like the loyalty of a dog. Not as fickle as a wolf. | You have to train a good war dog from a pup. Bite your arm clean off otherwise. | I can smell the blood. Good and sour. | I'll be handling the horses with Cedran gone. Miss that old man.

Name: Cedran
description: Cedran is the Breton hostler at Markarth Stables. He can sell you a black and white horse for 1000 septims.
canonical_lines: That would be Jarl Igmund. Young for a ruler of a Hold, especially the Reach. Wasn't surprising he stayed loyal to the Empire. His father helped capture Ulfric Stormcloak after the Markarth incident. | Since the Stormcloaks took over, Jarl Thongvor is in charge. It'll be lean times for the Reach with a Silver-Blood ruling it, that's for certain. | How are the new breeds getting along with my dogs? | I'd rather spend the gold on a new litter of pups, but the horses bring in more gold. | You need a reliable horse in the Reach. That's what we have. | You treat a horse well, it'll take you to Oblivion and back.

Name: Kibell
description: Kibell is a Nord warrior who drives the Markarth carriage.
canonical_lines: I can take you to any of the hold capitals. | Traveling in the Reach is dangerous. You need a good carriage. | City of Markarth sure is a beauty. No doubt about that. | My carriage is the safest way to travel.

Name: Vigilance
description: Vigilance is a war dog that you can purchase for 500 gold. He is found next to the stables outside Markarth with his owner, Banning, who hints that Vigilance's ferocity was brought about by feeding him human flesh.

Name: Morven
description: Morven is a Breton witchblade living in Markarth at Nepos's house where he works as a servant.

Name: Nepos the Nose
description: Nepos the Nose is an elderly nightblade who lives a luxurious life in Markarth. He works for Thonar Silver-Blood by "handling" any situations with the workers.
canonical_lines: Because my king told me to. Madanach. | A monster? No. I'm just a servant. To my king, Madanach. | Fine. Not like it will matter much. Jarl's not going to arrest Nepos. Just tell me when you want me to go. | Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send him/her in. | I'm sorry about my housekeeper. She's a little protective of me. Now, what is it you want? | My king. Madanach.

Name: Tynan
description: Tynan is a Breton witchblade who lives in Markarth. He works as a henchman and bodyguard for Nepos the Nose.

Name: Uaile
description: Uaile is a Breton witchblade who lives in Markarth. She is the daughter of Uraccen, a prisoner incarcerated in Cidhna Mine.
canonical_lines: Excuse me. What's your business here? | If you must know, I'm the maid. And the master of the house is old and needs his rest. So if you don't have any business. Leave. | That's what I thought. | Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send him/her in. | Thank you. Here's something for you. It's surprising, but Nepos does pay me well. It's a sore comfort, though. | You proved father was innocent? Oh, thank you. Thank you! We... we can leave Markarth now. Together. Maybe uncle Ainethach will let us stay at his in Karthwasten. I'm sure he will.

Name: Ogmund
description: Ogmund is a Nord and the resident bard (or as he puts it, "old skald") at the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth. While most of his time is spent at the inn, he also spends some time at his home nearby.
canonical_lines: I've seen every corner of Skyrim, but nothing is as beautiful as the battlefield. | Stormcloaks took Markarth. It is good to see Talos worshipped openly again. | Praise Talos! | It's a school that teaches music, poetry, that sort of thing. Most bards in Skyrim have been to the college at some point. If you're thinking of applying, talk to Viarmo in Solitude. | Son, I know thousands of the old ballads. If I played all of them, everyone in this inn would be as grey as I am before I finished. | That's a sensible lad. Now fetch me drink.

Name: Weylin
description: Weylin is a Breton witchblade from Markarth. Up until recently an employee at the local smelter, Weylin lives in the Warrens, but will never be seen there because when you enter the city for the first time, he will attempt to murder a woman named Margret.
canonical_lines: The old gods give me strength! | I bleed for the people of the Reach! | I die for my people. | The Reach belongs to the Forsworn! | We are the rightful rulers of Markarth! | You have stepped on us long enough!

Name: Rogatus Salvius
description: Rogatus Salvius is an elderly farmer who lives in the farmhouse at Salvius Farm, located just outside the Markarth city walls, with his wife Vigdis. He is the father of Leontius Salvius.
canonical_lines: No. I have enough trouble without more mouths to feed! They're the Jarl's men, they can eat supper at the keep. | I've lived through rebellion, Forsworn, undead, witches, wizards, hagravens, and marriage. | I'm been farming this bit of land all my life. | You ever have to farm land while there was a battle going on? I have. | Damn soldiers always trample my crops. | What kind of question is that? Look at me! Is this a young man's face? I've been here 50 years, and nothing is going to move me off my land.

Name: Vigdis Salvius
description: Vigdis Salvius is an elderly farmer who lives in the farmhouse at Salvius Farm, located just outside the Markarth city walls. She is married to Rogatus Salvius, and they have one son: Leontius Salvius.
canonical_lines: No. I have enough trouble without more mouths to feed! They're the Jarl's men, they can eat supper at the keep. | Our son Leontius moved to Old Hroldan nearly 30 years ago. I still miss him. | I hope my son has found some nice, well-mannered girl to settle down with. | Rogatus and I have been married over 50 years. He's always been a bit of a grouch. | Terrible. Only a matter of time before soldiers come and burn all my hard work into dust! | Look at the sky. Be a terrible day tomorrow. I know it.

Name: Frabbi
description: Frabbi is a Nord food vendor who works in the Silver-Blood Inn in the city of Markarth. Her husband is Kleppr and they have a daughter, Hroki, and a son, Hreinn.
canonical_lines: Unlike my husband Kleppr, I watch after our guests. | Now you just tell me if you need something. | You come right to me if you find an unwashed floor or lumpy bed. | I'll bend Kleppr's ear if there's anything wrong with a room you rent. | Isn't my son Hreinn such a good worker? Not like his father at all.... | My worthless husband is gone, so I run the inn now.

Name: Hogni Red-Arm
description: Hogni Red-Arm is a Nord meat merchant who spends his days running a stall in Markarth's marketplace, in front of the city's gate.
canonical_lines: Alms. Give me some meat, you fat Nord! | Picking on me again, you backbiting Nord? Tired of those prissy nobles turning down your rotten slabs of venison? | A man like me makes a lot of enemies. People are always trying to cheat me. | I paid extra for the biggest room in the Silver-Blood Inn. I need space to stretch these arms. | That's disgusting, get that rotting carcass away from me! | I don't need to know if it's fresh from this distance.

Name: Hreinn
description: Hreinn, a Nord citizen, is the son of Kleppr and Frabbi, and the brother of Hroki. He helps his parents run the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth.
canonical_lines: My father Kleppr is the one you want to talk to. I just clean up. | Will I need to talk so loudly with my wife when I get married? | Dibella's Heart, son, I hope not. | How are your chores coming, my son? | Today I've cleaned the linens, washed the floors, and checked in on all our guests. | Ah, my son, you'll be a fine innkeeper someday, like your father.

Name: Hroki
description: Hroki is a Nord that works in the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth. She is the daughter of Kleppr and Frabbi and the sister of Hreinn.
canonical_lines: I'm just here to clean up. | My father is more generous than he lets on. Gives me plenty of spending money. | That's disgusting, get that rotting carcass away from me! | I don't need to know if it's fresh from this distance. | Ugh. You're the most disgusting merchant I have ever seen. The guards should take you away. | If you ever think of throwing meat at me, I will have you dragged off to Cidhna Mine so fast the guards will yank those filthy arms of yours off.

Name: Kleppr
description: Kleppr is a Nord who manages the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth. He is married to Frabbi and they have two children: Hroki, and Hreinn.
canonical_lines: If I can't get you something, I'm sure my wife will bellow at me until I can. | Things are so much quieter with my darling Frabbi dead. | This is the Silver-Blood Inn. I'll let you figure out who owns it by yourself. | Any aspiring mage would do well to look for the College in Winterhold. Head there, and you'll get what you're after. Although our Jarl's humble wizard might be willing to help you too. | Unlike my husband Kleppr, I watch after our guests. | I don't know, my darling wife. I assume you're going to tell me?

Name: Margret
description: Margret is a Nord citizen visiting Markarth from her home in Cyrodiil.
canonical_lines: No. I don't have any idea. I was just shopping for a pendant for my sister back in the Imperial City. | I'm shopping. Excuse me. | I should never have come to Markarth. | By the gods, that man nearly killed me. You saved my life. Thank you. Here, I was going to bring this to my sister, but I think you should have it. | I've heard of them. Something about the men who live in the hills and attack caravans. I'm sorry. I don't know anymore. I'm just visiting here from Cyrodiil. | I'm sorry, I'm still a bit dizzy from everything.

Name: Vigilant Tyranus
description: Vigilant Tyranus is an Imperial witchblade encountered outside the Abandoned House in Markarth. He is a Vigilant of Stendarr and as such, has dedicated his life to rid Tamriel of Daedra, wherever they appear.
canonical_lines: Excuse me, but do you know anything about this house? Seen anyone enter or leave? | I'm with the Vigil of Stendarr. We believe this house might have been used for Daedra worship. Evil rites and so forth. | I was actually just about to head on inside. Be good to have someone watch my back. Follow me, and keep your eyes open. Daedra are powerful creatures and tricksters. Never know what you'll find. | Fresh food. No wood rot on the furniture. Someone's been here. Recently. But the people I asked say no one enters or leaves.... | Wait. Did you hear that? I think it came this way. | It's you or me!

Name: Vorstag
description: Vorstag is a Nord warrior living in Markarth at the Silver-Blood Inn. He can be hired as a follower for a fee of 500 septims.
canonical_lines: Can't be too careful these days, with the war and other dangers. For a fair price, I'll watch your back. | I'm what you'd call of soldier of fortune. Make me an offer, and I just might fight at your side. | Some call me a mercenary, but I like to think of myself as a freelance adventurer for hire. | Watch your back, friend. Better yet, pay me to do it for you. | I'll wait here. Just don't start any trouble without me. | Farewell, then. If you need my services again, just come and look for me in the usual place.

Name: Mulush gro-Shugurz
description: Mulush gro-Shugurz, an Orc warrior, is the smelter overseer in Markarth. He lives in the Smelter Overseer's House.
canonical_lines: All right, all right. You sound like a damn Legion officer, but I get it. I'll give him a break. This better not hurt our quota. | You're not one of my workers. What are you doing here? | You hard of hearing? I run this smelter. And I'm late meeting our silver quota. What do you want? | I oversee Markarth Smelter. Worker gets out of line, I get him back in line. | Shipment of silver this month is behind. Nepos is to blame, not me. | I tell Thonar I can only smelt what Nepos and his miners dig up.

Name: Urzoga gra-Shugurz
description: Urzoga gra-Shugurz is an Orc warrior in charge of Cidhna Mine in Markarth. She is the sister of Mulush gro-Shugurz, who works the smelter outside the prison entrance.
canonical_lines: I'm in charge of the prisoners here. | No funny business. I'm watching you. | You do something out of line, I'll put you down. | You'll pay off your debt to the Reach. Just work and you'll earn your freedom. | Don't get smart with me. I'm in charge. You keep it up, I'll have your toes cut off. | I said get down there. Now.

Name: Anwen
description: Anwen is a Redguard priestess of Dibella. She can be found in the inner sanctum of the Temple of Dibella.
canonical_lines: I have no words. Talk to . | The temple is still not clean. Get to it.

Name: Fjotra
description: Fjotra is a Nord child who is initially found in Broken Tower Redoubt. She has been kidnapped by a group of Forsworn and imprisoned in their redoubt.
canonical_lines: Are you one of them? Please don't hurt me. | Then it is true what they said? I am touched by the gods? | I've heard stories about the wonders of the great Temple in Markarth. But I never dreamed that I would even get to see it. I am honored to be called for this duty. Please, lead on. | Please, let's hurry to the Temple before the Forsworn find me again. | I can't wait to learn from the priestesses. | I hope we reach Markarth soon.

Name: Hamal
description: Hamal, a Nord priestess, is also known as "The Mother" to the priestesses at the Temple of Dibella. She can normally be found inside the Inner Sanctum of the temple.
canonical_lines: You, my dear, can earn the Blessing of Dibella. You'll find men to be more pliable in the future... or more vulnerable. | And just what do you think you're doing? | Unfortunately for you, we don't allow / into the inner sanctum. | Indeed it is. Unfortunately for you, we don't allow / into the inner sanctum. | There are many valuable artifacts all through the temple. Unfortunately for you, we don't allow into the inner sanctum. | You have committed a breach, and must pay the penalty.

Name: Orla
description: Orla, a Nord priestess of Dibella, lives at the Temple of Dibella. There are no beds at the temple, so she never sleeps.
canonical_lines: I'm not going to talk to you until this mess is cleaned up. | The temple is still not clean. Get to it.

Name: Senna
description: Senna is a Breton priestess at the Temple of Dibella in Markarth. She spends all of her time in the entrance area of the temple at the top floor, informing visitors of the temple's closure.
canonical_lines: I'm sorry, the Temple of Dibella is closed. You can receive your blessing, if you wish, but the other sisters are in seclusion. | Well, you are lovely to look at, and there's so many things I could teach you, but I'm afraid the Temple isn't taking in new students. | I see. So you don't remember fondling the statuary, then? | Oh, I'd love to help you figure it out, but I'm so busy cleaning up the mess you made of our temple... Now if you were to help tidy up and perhaps apologize afterwards... I might be able to help you. | Oh you must be nobility of some sort. Running around partying and paying others to clean it up. I don't think so. Clean up your own mess. | I suppose that'll do. Dibella teaches up forgiveness, after all. Even for a drunk like you.

Name: Betrid Silver-Blood
description: Betrid Silver-Blood is a Nord citizen who lives at the Treasury House in Markarth. Her husband is the influential head of the Silver-Blood family, Thonar, whom she only married for the money.
canonical_lines: I'm married to Thonar Silver-Blood. Keep that in mind while you're speaking to me. | I married Thonar for the money, and I'm not the least bit ashamed to admit it. | He's the real head of this family. He may not be the eldest, but all the work that keeps us respected is handled by my Thonar. | Yes, I was bored talking to you anyway. | Well maybe if you would finally convince Thongvor to put you in charge of the family, I wouldn't need to question you anymore. | I'll take control of the family on my own time, Betrid. Until then, my brother remains in charge and you'll keep your mouth shut.

Name: Donnel
description: Donnel is an elderly witchblade who lives and works at The Treasury House in Markarth. He and Nana Ildene clean the house.
canonical_lines: I work for the Silver-Bloods. Help clean. | Just here to work.

Name: Nana Ildene
description: Nana Ildene is a Breton witchblade who works and lives in Markarth at The Treasury House. She works as a cleaner and has done so for twenty years.
canonical_lines: I've worked in the Treasury House for almost twenty years. | There isn't an inch of this building that I haven't cleaned up. | Ah, Nana Ildene, whatever would my family do without you? | Oh, I know, Thonar. Only a mad woman would ever betray the Silver-Blood family. | Thanks Nana. I feel better now. | Omluag, Uaile, and Ildene are all involved. They must be waiting for the Forsworn to come so they help somehow. Figure out what they're up to. I'll pay you for any information you can find.

Name: Reburrus Quintilius
description: Reburrus Quintilius is a wealthy Imperial citizen living in Markarth. Although never specified, Reburrus works for the Silver-Blood family as some kind of bookkeeper.
canonical_lines: Reburrus, I need you to draft a letter to Ulfric requesting more men. | Thongvor, do you really think that's wise? I mean, King Ulfric is such a busy man, and there are so many areas of Skyrim to protect. | Whose side are you on, Reburrus? I'm not worried about Skyrim, I'm worried about the Reach. Specifically, the part of the Reach we're standing on. | Reburrus, there is a war being fought across all of Skyrim, and you bother me with the usual mundane reports about silver? | Why are you bothering me, kinsman/outsider? | I don't. Go bother Kleppr at the Silver-Blood Inn, he handles the newcomers. And by Ysmir, if you find work, just do what you're told. There's enough trouble in Markarth already.

Name: Rhiada
description: Rhiada is a Breton citizen and a servant of the Silver-Blood family at the Treasury House in Markarth.
canonical_lines: I'm just a servant. Don't pay me any mind. | Working in the Treasury House isn't so bad. I earn good money. | Ildene has been working in the Treasury House since before I was born. | Sometimes I hear Yngvar singing in his room. He's actually quite good. | I have records I need to tend to. | Why, thank you Thonar. I'm flattered.

Name: Thonar Silver-Blood
