Yes, I think I'll join you. | I'll bring a blanket and some wine. | One of these days, we'll have to find you a good woman like my Olda. | Yes, I think I'd enjoy a woman like your wife.

Name: Olda
description: Olda is a Nord lumberjack living in Dragon Bridge with her husband, Horgeir, who runs the local lumber mill.
canonical_lines: Have you met my husband? Well don't bother, he's a drunk. | Did my worthless husband send you? | It's not luck, it's mead I'm cursing. | Stendarr's Mercy to you. If my Horgeir doesn't give up the mead this time, I'll hit him over the head with it. Here, for your trouble. | I must have forgotten. I'll take care of it tomorrow. | See that you do. You're an embarrassment, Horgeir. I don't know why I married you.

Name: Commander Maro
description: Commander Maro is an Imperial warrior and the leader of the Penitus Oculatus stationed in Skyrim, responsible for the Emperor's security on his visit. His son, Gaius Maro, is also a Penitus Oculatus officer: you will be ordered to kill him in the quest Breaching Security.
canonical_lines: I'll make sure the Emperor himself hears of all you've accomplished. You've made Skyrim a better place. | Father, you worry too much. I'll be fine. | I know you will. But all the same, remember everything I said. Stay alert, and when you get to the cities, make your observations and move on. | I understand, But you're being paranoid. I'm inspecting security, not charging off into battle. There's not a lot that can go wrong. | Farewell, father. I'll return as soon as I'm able. | Trust me, we have nothing to say to one another.

Name: Gaius Maro
description: Gaius Maro is an Imperial warrior, an officer of the Penitus Oculatus and the son of Commander Maro. He is appointed by his father to "personally verify the security of every city in the province" in advance of the Emperor's visit to Skyrim.
canonical_lines: Father, you worry too much. I'll be fine. | I know you will. But all the same, remember everything I said. Stay alert, and when you get to the cities, make your observations and move on. | I understand, But you're being paranoid. I'm inspecting security, not charging off into battle. There's not a lot that can go wrong. | Farewell, father. I'll return as soon as I'm able. | Well, this is it, then. Look after yourself, Gaius. You're doing your duty, and I'm proud of you. But you'd better come back to me. You hear? | Oh, Faida. I may travel alone, but you know I carry you always in my heart. I'll see you soon.

Name: Penitus Oculatus Agent
canonical_lines: The city is crawling with Imperial Legion, and you know what? I'm still nervous. | I'm all for diplomacy, but the sooner the Emperor deals with this civil war mess, the sooner we can get back to Cyrodiil. | I'm fairly certain you wandered into the wrong building, friend... | I'm just here to provide protection for his eminence's cousin. Please, enjoy yourself. | She's dead! On my watch! This won't stand! | Lazy and useless, the lot of them. They can't even keep the Stormcloaks in line. No way I trust them with the Emperor's life.

Name: Gunnar Stone-Eye
description: Gunnar Stone-Eye is an elderly miner present in Helgen when Alduin attacks during the Unbound quest. He does not seemingly make it out of Helgen alive.
canonical_lines: Gunnar, take care of the boy. I have to find General Tullius and join the defense. | Gods guide you, Hadvar.

Name: Haming
description: Haming is an eleven-year-old Nord child who lives in Froki's Shack. Originally from the town of Helgen, he moves in with his grandfather, Froki Whetted-Blade, after Helgen is destroyed.
canonical_lines: Why? I want to watch the soldiers. | I'm done for, little cub. Go. Run for it! | That's it, son. Make me proud. | I'm eleven years old, and I could take you. | Someday I'm going to kill a dragon all by myself. | It ain't so bad. I miss living with my parents back in Helgen, though. Froki can't cook and there's nobody to talk to up here.

Name: Ingrid
description: Ingrid is a Nord food vendor who lives in Helgen at the start of the game. During the first scenes she shouts "Death to the Stormcloaks!" right after a Stormcloak rebel is executed.
canonical_lines: Death to the Stormcloaks!

Name: Matlara
description: Matlara is a Nord woman living in Helgen and mother to Haming as well as wife to Torolf. She is watching the whole time during the execution.

Name: Torolf
description: Torolf is a Nord lumberjack who appears at the beginning of the game. He is the son of Froki Whetted-Blade, the husband of Matlara, and the father of Haming.
canonical_lines: Why? I want to watch the soldiers. | I'm done for, little cub. Go. Run for it! | That's it, son. Make me proud. | Who are they, daddy? Where are they going? | You need to go inside, little cub. | Inside the house. Now.

Name: Vilod
description: Vilod is a Nord warrior living in Helgen at the beginning of the game. He is the proprietor of The Lost Man's Reprieve.
canonical_lines: I wonder if Vilod is still making that mead with juniper berries mixed in. | Tell my family I fought bravely. | The wounds are deep, Vilod! I can't stop the blood. | That'd be the College in Winterhold. I suppose you'll be headed there, then. Well, don't let me get in your way.

Name: Elenwen
description: Elenwen is a High Elf sorceress and First Emissary of the Thalmor in Skyrim. She resides in the Thalmor Embassy, in Haafingar hold.
canonical_lines: Look at him. General Tullius the Military Governor. And it looks like the Thalmor are with him. Damn elves. I bet they had something to do with this. | Welcome. I don't believe we've met. I am Elenwen, the Thalmor Ambassador to Skyrim. And you are...? | Ah yes. I remember your name from the guest list. Please, tell me more about yourself. What brings you to this... to Skyrim? | Have you? All good, I trust. But you have me at a disadvantage. I'm afraid I know nothing about you... Please, tell me more about yourself. What brings you to this... to Skyrim? | As long as the Empire continues to uphold its treaty obligations, my government does not concern itself with the internal politics of Skyrim. | General Tullius, stop! By the authority of the Thalmor, I'm taking custody of these prisoners.

Name: Hadvar
description: Hadvar is a Nord warrior, a soldier of the Imperial Legion, and an early companion. As one of the garrisoned troops defending Helgen, he tries to assist civilians, including Torolf's son Haming, while escaping the dragon raid.
canonical_lines: Gunnar, take care of the boy. I have to find General Tullius and join the defense. | Ralof! You damned traitor. Out of my way! | I guess that'll teach me to try to reason with a Stormcloak. | Listen, as far as I'm concerned you've already earned your pardon. But until we get that confirmed by General Tullius, just stay clear of other Imperial soldiers and avoid any complications, ? | Hadvar, thank Talos! Your friend told me about Helgen... | I don't know where to start. You know I was assigned to General Tullius's guard. We were stopped in Helgen when we were attacked... by a dragon.

Name: Imperial Captain
description: The Imperial Captain is a warrior and one of the first people you meet in the game. She is in charge of the Imperial Legion soldiers stationed at Helgen and orders your execution during the tutorial.
canonical_lines: Yes, General Tullius. | Next, the Nord in the rags! | I said, next prisoner! | Get these prisoners out of the carts. Move it! | Step towards the block when we call your name. One at a time. | Anyone else feel like running?

Name: Priestess of Arkay
canonical_lines: For the love of Talos, shut up and let's get this over with. | Come on, I haven't got all morning. My ancestors are smiling at me, Imperials. Can you say the same? | As we commend your souls to Aetherius, blessings of the Eight Divines upon you, for you are the salt and earth of Nirn, our beloved.... | As you wish.

Name: Gunjar
description: Gunjar is a Nord warrior and a carriage driver who can be hired at Lakeview Manor.

Name: Lokir
description: Lokir of Rorikstead is a Nord horse thief. He is bound in the same prison carriage as Ralof, Ulfric and you on the way to Helgen at the start of the game.
canonical_lines: Look at him. General Tullius the Military Governor. And it looks like the Thalmor are with him. Damn elves. I bet they had something to do with this. | No, I'm not a rebel. You can't do this! | I told those Imperial soldiers you weren't with us. But they just grabbed you. Like that thief over there. | What brings you into the cold grip of the Empire anyway? I know you're not one of the rebels. | "Freedom of the Nine Holds"? I don't remember the Empire sweeping up every cutpurse in Skyrim before you bastards started butchering their soldiers! | Lokir, and I'm not a Stormcloak!

Name: Ralof
description: Ralof is a Nord barbarian, a member of the Stormcloaks, and an early companion. Captured alongside you, he escapes Imperial custody when the dragon Alduin attacks Helgen.
canonical_lines: It's you and me, prisoner. Stay close! Ralof! You damned traitor. Out of my way! | Uncle Ralof! Can I see your axe? How many Imperials have you killed? Do you really know Ulfric Stormcloak? | I ought to get back to work before I'm missed, but... did anyone else escape? Did Ulfric... | Don't worry. I'm sure he made it out. It'll take more than a dragon to stop Ulfric Stormcloak. | Ha! I knew you'd join up. Great news. We'll take back Skyrim together, eh? I'm glad I'll have you beside me in there. This place chills my blood, and I don't care who knows it | Hey, you. You're finally awake. You were trying to cross the border, right? Walked right into that Imperial ambush, same as us, and that thief over there.

Name: Boti
description: Boti is a Nord farmer who lives at Fellstar Farm in Ivarstead, together with her husband Jofthor and daughter Fastred. She and her husband keep a close eye on Fastred, being with her nearly all day.
canonical_lines: Pilgrim or not, if I were you, I'd move right through our backwards little town. | I hope Fastred's doing well in Riften. I miss her. | It's frightening living below their monastery. Sometimes I swear I can hear strange noises rolling down from up there. It sounds like thunder, but there's never any rain. What do you make of that? | While you're under our roof, I need you to pitch in a little more. | She's our only child, Boti. Am I to throw her to the wolves? | You're hardly throwing her to the wolves. She just wants to see the world... just like I did when I was her age.

Name: Fastred
description: Fastred is a Nord farmer and a resident of Ivarstead. She lives with her parents, Boti and Jofthor, at Fellstar Farm.
canonical_lines: Have anything interesting to tell me? | I can't imagine how exciting it must be like to journey from place to place. You're so lucky! | The Greybeards are a strange bunch. I heard they live their entire life without uttering a single word; can you even imagine? | I wish I could go with you... | I prayed to Mara and she spoke to me in a dream. She said a stranger would appear to help me. Is that you? | I don't want to choose! They're both so amazing.

Name: Jofthor
description: Jofthor is a Nord farmer living in Ivarstead, where he owns Fellstar Farm with his wife Boti and daughter Fastred. He is rather overprotective of his daughter who wishes to become an adventurer.
canonical_lines: My daughter's driving me crazy, so forgive me if I'm a bit on edge. | Any idea how I can get my daughter's head out of the clouds? | Watch yourself on High Hrothgar, I hear wolves prowl the steps. | I can't believe Fastred ran off to Riften with that... that bastard. | I can't believe Fastred's gone. I... I should have been nicer to her. | They call the path to the monastery the 7,000 Steps. Can you imagine? I'm not certain if I could even make it to the top without collapsing from exhaustion.

Name: Klimmek
description: Klimmek is a Nord citizen and a resident of Ivarstead. He's sharing his house with Bassianus Axius, who was looking for a job and a place to live, both currently working together as fishermen.
canonical_lines: I wish I could make my deliveries more often, but the road's getting dangerous. | Welp, time to gather more supplies I guess. | I'm becoming sick to death of your ideas. | We're behind again. I need you to catch another two bushels by week's end if I'm to make another delivery. | Blood from a stone, Klimmek. I've been out there every morning. They just aren't biting. | That's none of your business and I appreciate if you wouldn't mention it again.

Name: Bassianus Axius
description: Bassianus Axius is a Nord citizen and a resident of Ivarstead where he works as a fisherman. A lover of Fastred, Bassianus' desire is for both of them to leave for Riften against the wishes of Fastred's father, Jofthor.
canonical_lines: If you have a moment, I've come up with a few ideas I wanted to share. | I'm becoming sick to death of your ideas. Not one of them has paid off since you moved in. | Look, I'm merely suggesting a few things that could expand our business. | 'Our' business? As I remember things, it was you that showed up at my doorstep looking for a job and a place to live. Try and remember that. | We're behind again. I need you to catch another two bushels by week's end if I'm to make another delivery. | Blood from a stone, Klimmek. I've been out there every morning. They just aren't biting.

Name: Gwilin
description: Gwilin is a Wood Elf citizen and a resident of Ivarstead. He is the apprentice of Temba Wide-Arm and helps her out at her sawmill.
canonical_lines: Hello, my friend? What can I do for you on such a fine day? | I hope life's treating you well, friend. | Those bears are making Miss Temba so angry. I hope you can do something about them. | Miss Temba is much happier now that you took care of those bears. She may not look like she is, but I can tell. | Always thought it was odd that there's a layer of thick clouds covering the peak of the mountain above the monastery. Not sure what's up there, but I bet the Greybeards know. | Not today. I'm just not ready to make the climb to High Hrothgar. The path isn't safe.

Name: Lynly Star-Sung
description: Lynly Star-Sung is a Nord working at the Vilemyr Inn in Ivarstead, both as bard and as serving girl. She will take requests for five septims.
canonical_lines: Anything I can help you with? A drink or a room perhaps? | If you fancy a bit of music, let me know. | Pardon me, milord/milady. Would you care to hear me play my lute? | I've always fancied a journey up the 7,000 Steps to the monastery. Anything to break the boredom of living in this town. I envy you. | That's so sweet of you. I'll tell you what... I'll play a special song, just for you, for no charge at all. | I thought you played wonderfully last night.

Name: Temba Wide-Arm
description: Temba Wide-Arm is a Nord citizen of Ivarstead who owns the town's sawmill. She fears losing her sawmill due to bears, claiming that they scratch trees with their claws therefore degrading the quality of the wood.
canonical_lines: This has to be the worst place in Skyrim to run a mill. How am I supposed to do anything with all those bears running around? | Are you kidding? Those damn things will drive me right out of business! Tell you what. Bring me ten of their pelts from anywhere in Skyrim I'll gladly pay you for thinning out the herd. | These damn bears are driving me crazy! | I swear, if one more thing goes wrong, I'm going to burn my mill to the ground! | I'm going to put those pelts you gave me to good use. | The Greybeards stay away from me, and I stay away from them. Suits me just fine.

Name: Wilhelm
description: Wilhelm is the Nord innkeeper of Vilemyr Inn in Ivarstead. Upon raising Wilhelm's disposition, he will become a potential candidate for marriage.
canonical_lines: I've got no interest in magic users. No use for their kind at all. They're way up north in Winterhold, and that's fine with me. I don't even like our Jarl havin' a court wizard. | Welcome to the Vilemyr Inn. If there's anything I can get you, just let me know. | Let me know if I can get you anything. | If I were you, I'd keep away from the barrow on the east side of town... it's haunted. | Now that our "ghost" has been unmasked, I hope we see more visitors in town than just the occasional pilgrim. | I heard tell of a lad in Windhelm. Aventus Aretino. They say he's been doing the Black Sacrament, trying to contact the Dark Brotherhood. Damn fool.

Name: Barknar
description: Barknar is a Nord camped out in Dayspring Canyon. He came to Fort Dawnguard with his wife Alvide for protection from the vampires but the Dawnguard won't let him in.
canonical_lines: I've no love for living out of a tent, but I'll take that over being ripped apart. | I hope Alvide doesn't think less of me, but I can't protect her on my own. We're safer here. | Why can't they just let us in? We won't get in the way! | It looks like this is as close as we're going to get being safe from the vampires.

Name: Ivarstead Guard
description: Ivarstead Guards are special Stormcloak guards that can be found at Ivarstead. If the Rift is conquered by the Imperials, they will all be replaced with Imperial Guards.

Name: Narfi
description: Narfi is a Nord beggar living in Ivarstead. Up until a year ago, he lived together with his sister, Reyda, in the broken down home of his parents.
canonical_lines: I miss Reyda. She was so nice to Narfi. | I can't see you, Reyda! I can't find you! Why are you hiding? Hiding, hide, hide, hide! Don't make me sad! | With father I said goodbye... with mother I said goodbye. Reyda leaves and Narfi can't say goodbye. Makes Narfi very, very sad. Narfi needs Reyda to say goodbye. | Oh... Oh no... Please, please... I ain't never harmed no one... Old Narfi just wants to be left alone... | Oh Reyda! ! You live among the clouds now, dear Reyda! | Narfi's sad he can't be with Reyda.

Name: Enmon
description: Enmon is a Breton miner living in Karthwasten with his wife Mena. They have a daughter named Fjotra, who has been kidnapped by a group of Forsworn.
canonical_lines: I hope Fjotra is happy in the temple. We're so honored to have given her. | She... really? That's... I wouldn't have dreamed. Of course, we need her in Markarth, then. I'll come with you. | That's... that's good of you. If you were to save her, I would be very grateful. I don't think there's anything I could give you, though... | I swear, if those things have laid a hand on her... | Let's find Fjotra. This place gives me the creeps. | I'm to go to the temple in Markarth. I... I'll have to leave you and mother.

Name: Mena
description: Mena is a Breton citizen living in Karthwasten with her husband Enmon. She has a daughter, named Fjotra, who has been taken captive by a group of Forsworn.
canonical_lines: Oh, I... I'm sorry. I just can't... you'll have to speak to my husband. | I don't know. The guards are out looking for her, now. They'll be back soon. | Are you all right, dear? I thought I saw a tear in your eye a moment ago. | Oh, I'm fine, Enmon. I just... I still miss her. | I miss her, too, but I'm glad she's safe. | So am I. I hope she's happy at the temple.

Name: Ainethach
description: Ainethach is a Breton miner and the owner of Karthwasten and its two mines, Sanuarach Mine and Fenn's Gulch Mine. He has two adult children named Rondach and Voada who work in Understone Keep as the chef's assistants.
canonical_lines: I'm one of the few native sons of the Reach that owns land. It doesn't make me very popular. | If the Forsworn aren't attacking my town, the Nords are trying to force me off it. | Finally, both of my mines are open again. Time for everyone to get back to work. | I want you sellswords out of my mine. | The Silver-Bloods have made you a very generous offer for this pile of dirt. I suggest you take it. | You can try, but I'd keep your sword-arm ready if things get ugly.

Name: Belchimac
description: Belchimac is a Breton miner who lives and works in Karthwasten.
canonical_lines: The good mine is closed and the other mine has no ore. Gods have cursed me. | mine is open again. How am I supposed to handle all this work? | Oh, they'll find some way to send us there. It'll be just my luck. | What did you say? You lazy coward, I'll cut your throat. | Nothing, Ragnar. Please... don't hurt me. | I... I'm sorry, Belchimac. I didn't mean that.

Name: Lash gra-Dushnikh
description: Lash gra-Dushnikh is an Orc miner living in Karthwasten. She is originally from Dushnikh Yal.
canonical_lines: I work in the mines. I hunt. Everything else I do is my business. | I thought Enmon and had a little girl, but I haven't seen her in a while. | So that's it, then. 'Don't come back.' Thank you. Here. You honored my mother's task and should be rewarded. Now, I need to be alone. | I don't like bunking with Orcs. It's not... clean. | If you want me to leave, you could challenge me to a fight. I promise to stop once you've lost an arm. | What I meant to say was... I love having an Orc here in the barracks. They're so... pleasant.

Name: Ragnar
description: Ragnar is a Nord miner who lives and works in Karthwasten. He is Ainethach's right-hand man, claiming that his employer is "a good man".
canonical_lines: I think you might be looking for Enmon. | I've been thinking, would you like to join me in hunting? | You want me to hunt with you? I thought you preferred being alone. | Your arms and legs are fit for catching strong, agile prey. I could use your help. | I'd be honored, but I have work to do in the mines. | I don't know. Whenever those Silver-Blood men decide to leave.

Name: Atar
description: Atar, a Nord warrior, is a mercenary employed by Markarth's Silver-Blood family, stationed in Karthwasten. Due to a recent Forsworn attack on Sanuarach Mine, he and his mercenary band have seized the mine and will not allow the locals of Karthwasten to work; under the instructions of the Silver-Blood family, he is attempting to browbeat Ainethach into selling the silver-rich Sanuarach Mine so the Silver-Bloods can expand their property hold on the Reach.
canonical_lines: I want you sellswords out of my mine. | The Silver-Bloods have made you a very generous offer for this pile of dirt. I suggest you take it. | I'm not from here. I'm a sellsword. These are my men. | Do that and I'll make sure you get a cut. | Good work. Here's your cut. I guess this finishes up our contract with the Silver-Bloods, so we'll be heading out. | Helping out Ainethach, huh? Give me a reason not to plunge a dagger in your chest.

Name: Alvor
description: Alvor is a Nord blacksmith who lives in Riverwood. He lives with his wife Sigrid and his daughter Dorthe, and he is the uncle of Hadvar.
canonical_lines: Oh, I know it! You keep working hard, like you been doing, and you could be the greatest blacksmith Skyrim has ever seen. | Hadvar, thank Talos! Your friend told me about Helgen... | I don't know where to start. You know I was assigned to General Tullius's guard. We were stopped in Helgen when we were attacked... by a dragon. | I'm sure Riverwood will be all right, dear. When the Jarl learns what's happened, he's sure to send soldiers. Go on, Hadvar. Let's hear the rest of it. | Jarl Balgruuf? He rules Whiterun Hold. A good man, perhaps a bit over-cautious, but these are dangerous times. So far he's managed to stay out of the war. I'm afraid it can't last, though. | I don't think he likes either Ulfric or Elisif much. Who can blame him? But I've no doubt he'll prove loyal to the Empire in the end. He's no traitor.

Name: Dorthe
description: Dorthe is a Nord child who lives in Riverwood. Sigrid and Alvor are her mother and father, and she is a cousin of Hadvar.
canonical_lines: Oh, I know it! You keep working hard, like you been doing, and you could be the greatest blacksmith Skyrim has ever seen. | Papa says I'm too friendly with strangers, but you seem all right. | My father is Alvor, the blacksmith. I'm his assistant. I mean, apprentice. | Papa says I'm not ready for weapons. So I make lots of horseshoes and hobnails. | Mama doesn't think I'm girlish enough. But that's just stupid girl talk. | Papa may have wanted a son, but he got me. He's a lucky man.

Name: Sigrid
description: Sigrid is a Nord living in Riverwood with her husband Alvor, the local blacksmith. She spends most of her day walking around the streets of Riverwood.
canonical_lines: I just hope the war doesn't come to Riverwood. There's enough trouble in the world without those Stormcloaks stirring up more. | Alvor and I, we got a daughter. Little Dorthe. | I'm spoken for, you know. So don't get any ideas. | You're pretty, I'll give ya that. Just stay away from my husband, Alvor. | Dorthe needs to spend more time in the garden. I could use the help. | It don't matter what I grow - my Alvor, he'll eat anything.

Name: Faendal
description: Faendal is a Wood Elf thief living in Riverwood. He is the common level trainer for Archery.
canonical_lines: Riverwood's agreeable enough, I suppose. For a Nord village. | Did I see you talking to Sven? Maybe not. Maybe...nevermind. But I would stay away from him if I were you. | There's beauty here unmatched in all of Skyrim, to be sure. | If only Camilla shared my affections. Or even knew about them. | I work at the lumber mill, but I escape into the forest whenever possible. | I miss Valenwood, but the wilds here are... serviceable.

Name: Frodnar
description: Frodnar is a Nord child who lives in Riverwood. He enjoys playing pranks on people and can sometimes be found talking to his friend Dorthe about pulling a prank.
canonical_lines: Uncle Ralof! Can I see your axe? How many Imperials have you killed? Do you really know Ulfric Stormcloak? | You're new around here, so I'll go easy on ya, but don't get on my bad side. | Get me mad, and I'll prank ya. And not a little. A lot. | So I like to have a little fun, so what. | My friend Dorthe doesn't like my pranking. "You're being mean, Frodnar!" So what if I am? | Mother wants me to work at the mill, but I ain't nobody's slave.

Name: Gerdur
description: Gerdur is a Nord lumberjack in Riverwood. She runs the mill with her husband, Hod, and they have a son, Frodnar.
canonical_lines: It's my mill. Some folks think it's my town too, but it ain't. The Jarl in Whiterun owns the land and the town. I just pay the taxes. | You did? We heard that Ulfric was captured... ... no, sorry, but in times like these I can't just take the word of a stranger who wanders into town claiming to be my brother's friend. | Uncle Ralof! Can I see your axe? How many Imperials have you killed? Do you really know Ulfric Stormcloak? | I ought to get back to work before I'm missed, but... did anyone else escape? Did Ulfric... | Don't worry. I'm sure he made it out. It'll take more than a dragon to stop Ulfric Stormcloak. | I own the lumber mill, and pay a fair wage. See my husband Hod if you're looking for work.

Name: Hod
description: Hod is a Nord lumberjack in Riverwood who operates the wood mill there. He lives on the southeast edge of town and works his small farm and the mill with his wife, Gerdur.
canonical_lines: You met Camilla yet? Wouldn't mind getting my hands on those trunks. He he he he. | At least the damned war hasn't gotten here. Yet. | Me, I've got my axe, my wife Gerdur and my boy Frodnar. That's all I need. | Woodcutting's my trade. Best log splitter from here to Riften. | So you saw a dragon, did you? Tell me, what was it like? As big as a house? | Sure, sure. It's just, you know, not every day I meet someone who's laid eyes on a dragon.

Name: Stump
description: Stump is a dog that belongs to Frodnar and lives in Riverwood. He follows Frodnar around during the day and spends the night outside.
canonical_lines: Sure I am. We get some furs and tree branches, paint them white, and then tie them to Stump. Instant Frostbite Spider! | Wait, so... a costume? You're not serious... | Frodnar... nobody is going to believe that your dog is a... Frostbite Spider. And if they do... they'll kill him. That's not much of a prank. | Oh yeah, and what would you rather do? | How about... we play tag! You're it! | Hey, no fair! Get her, Stump!

Name: Camilla Valerius
description: Camilla Valerius is an Imperial pawnbroker, and the sister of Lucan Valerius, the owner of Riverwood Trader in Riverwood. If Lucan dies, Camilla will take over the store.
canonical_lines: I came here from the Imperial Province, to work with my brother Lucan. | I came to Skyrim looking for a better life. So what did I get? Another war. | I said no! No adventures, no theatrics, no thief-chasing! | Oh really? Well I think your new helper here needs a guide. | Wh- no... I.... Oh, by the Eight, fine. But only to the edge of town! | Oh, really? You're just like my brother. Fine, but if you change your mind, I'll be right here.

Name: Lucan Valerius
description: Lucan Valerius is an Imperial pawnbroker, and the owner of the Riverwood Trader in Riverwood. He lives upstairs with his sister Camilla Valerius, who runs the store with him.
canonical_lines: I said no! No adventures, no theatrics, no thief-chasing! | Oh really? Well I think your new helper here needs a guide. | Wh- no... I.... Oh, by the Eight, fine. But only to the edge of town! | Don't let my sister do anything foolish. | Thanks. I guess this was the least you could do after what happened to Camilla. | Thanks. I only wish Camilla was here to see it. Here, take this. You've done a good thing for the Riverwood Trader.

Name: Delphine
description: Delphine, a Breton, is likely the first innkeeper that you will meet in the game. She initially lives in Riverwood at the Sleeping Giant Inn and can rent you a room for ten septims.
canonical_lines: Oh, have no fear. The Jarl himself has finally taken an interest, so I'm now able to devote most of my time to this research. | It was the only way I could make sure it wasn't a Thalmor trap. I'm not your enemy. I already gave you the horn. I'm actually trying to help you. I just need you to hear me out. | And now you have it. No harm done. I knew the Greybeards would send you for the horn if they thought you were Dragonborn. Taking it was the only way I could be sure this wasn't a Thalmor trap. | I doubt the Thalmor are aware of you yet. So we should be safe from them, at least. | I've figured out how we're going to get you into the Thalmor Embassy. | I've been doing this a long time, remember? While the Thalmor's been looking for me, I've been watching them.

Name: Embry
description: Embry is a Nord lumberjack and the local drunk of Riverwood.
canonical_lines: Outta my way, stranger. | Not now. If I don't pull night duty, I'll drink a round with you at the Sleeping Giant. | But I'm thirsty now. | You're always thirsty. Just like you're always drunk. Now let me get back to my rounds. | Care to have a drink with me, sweet Sigrid? | So that's a no I take it?

Name: Orgnar
description: Orgnar is the Nord barkeeper at the Sleeping Giant Inn in Riverwood. He is the somewhat sullen employee of Delphine, who owns the inn, and the two snipe at each other over business matters.
canonical_lines: We got rooms and food. Drink, too. I cook. Ain't much else to tell. | I'm just the cook, lad/lass. | I ain't lookin' to make friends. | Word is Ulfric Stormcloak escaped from the Imperials. War's only going to get worse, now. | They say a dragon attacked Helgen. Sounds like hogwash to me. | Inn's closed. Bar's still open, though. Feel free to sit and put your head down on the table for as long as you like. I won't bother you.

Name: Hilde
description: Hilde, an elderly Nord citizen, is the mother of local bard Sven; they share a house in Riverwood. She dislikes "cats, lizards and elves", in particular Faendal, who rivals her son's love affair with Camilla Valerius.
canonical_lines: I raised my Sven to be strong, and proud. A true Nord. | What happened to my Skyrim? Everywhere you look, cats, lizards and elves. It's sickening. | Has my son Sven asked to join the war? | A dragon! I saw a dragon! | Dragons, now, is it? Please, mother. If you keep on like this everyone in town will think you're crazy. And I've got better things to do than listen to more of your fantasies. | You'll see! It was a dragon! It'll kill us all and then you'll believe me!

Name: Sven
description: Sven is a Nord lumberjack living in the town of Riverwood. He is a graduate from the Bards College and makes a living playing music at the Sleeping Giant Inn.
canonical_lines: Truly? So maybe my mother isn't crazy after all. You had best tell the Jarl in Whiterun. He needs to know about this. | Faendal thinks he can woo Camilla Valerius away from me. She's already mine, I keep telling him. | You should come hear me play at the Sleeping Giant Inn. For a small sum you can even pick the song. | I've been trained as a skald, as was my father, and my father's father before him. | I'm composing a new song. A ballad, for Camilla Valerius. | Some day Camilla will know of my affections. Some day...

Name: Ennis
description: Ennis is a Redguard farmer who can be found at the Cowflop Farmhouse in Rorikstead. He shares his home with Reldith, the Altmer with whom he has lived since she rescued him after he was orphaned.
canonical_lines: Oh, I don't know. Yes, we'd make more money, but I don't like the idea of you traveling alone out there with the war and talk of dragons. | Come on now, we discussed that. I wouldn't be traveling all of Skyrim. It'd just to Whiterun and back, that's it. | I'll tell you who I don't envy - those poor children who lost their parents in this war. | Name's Ennis. If you've got friends who do business in Whiterun, they might know me. | You talk to Reldith yet? She's like a mother to me. | You here from the city? I visit Whiterun from time to time, mostly to make deals.

Name: Halvar
description: Halvar is a Nord farmhand currently working in Rorikstead. He is the owner of Hilda, a trained pack goat, although he has placed a notice for sale in The Bannered Mare and will sell you the goat for 200 gold during the related quest.
canonical_lines: If you change your mind, you know where to find me. | For that price? Sure.

Name: Reldith
description: Reldith is a High Elf farmer living in Cowflop Farmhouse in Rorikstead. She loves her work, and lives with and is the adoptive mother of Ennis, who runs the business side of their farm.
canonical_lines: Oh, I don't know. Yes, we'd make more money, but I don't like the idea of you traveling alone out there with the war and talk of dragons. | Come on now, we discussed that. I wouldn't be traveling all of Skyrim. It'd just to Whiterun and back, that's it. | I'll tell you who I don't envy - those poor children who lost their parents in this war. | Have you given my idea any more thought? You said you'd let me know yesterday, and that obviously didn't happen. | Tomorrow. I'll let you know tomorrow. | Another fine day at work in the fields. I don't envy those city folk who miss out on the joys of working the land.

Name: Erik the Slayer
description: Erik is a Nord barbarian living in Rorikstead. He is the son of Mralki, innkeeper of the Frostfruit Inn.
canonical_lines: If I can make enough money here in Skyrim, I think I'll travel to Hammerfell and see what work I can get there. | You look like you've seen your share of adventure. I envy you that. In fact, maybe you can help me with something. | Did you reconsider? Will you talk to my father? | It's true. For as long as I can remember our crops have always done well. I'm not sure whether it's the soil, the climate or the favor of the Divines, but we've never had a poor harvest. | Thank you. I can't stand the thought of being trapped in this village for the rest of my days. | Well, if you change your mind, I'd still like your help.

Name: Mralki
description: Mralki is a Nord food vendor living in Rorikstead. He is the owner of the Frostfruit Inn, and the father of Erik.
canonical_lines: There's times I think you're the coldest man in Skyrim. This is your own flesh and blood you're talking about. | If you need a meal or a room, I've got both. | Bit of advice, folks here don't care for magic or those that use it. If you're intent on it, check at the College up in Winterhold. Either that or go see the Jarl's court wizard. | Some folk here will tell you I'm sheltering my boy too much, but I ask you, isn't it a father's duty to keep his children safe? | I know where this is going, son. As I've said many a time. the world is a dangerous place. You're much safer here at the farm, with me. | But I don't want to be safe! I'm not afraid of the dangers out there. The only thing I'm afraid of is wasting my life on this farm.

Name: Britte
description: Britte is a Nord child living in Rorikstead with her father Lemkil and her twin sister Sissel. The family is rather dysfunctional, and a frustrated Lemkil makes no attempt to hide his disdain for his children, claiming that they are useless farmers, as well as blaming them for his late wife's untimely death during labor.
canonical_lines: If you beat up my sister Sissel, I won't tell. | Sissel thinks she's so special. No way she's more special than me. | I'm the older sister, by nearly five minutes. Sissel's barely worthy to walk in my shadow. | Why? What did I do? | I told you to weed the garden by sunset, and you didn't do it. Now you're in big trouble! | Papa told you to do that, not me! Now leave me alone!

Name: Lemkil
description: Lemkil is a Nord farmer working to make a living in the small farming community of Rorikstead. He is the widowed father of twin daughters, Sissel and Britte, and takes out his bitterness on his children with insults, beatings, and neglect.
canonical_lines: There's times I think you're the coldest man in Skyrim. This is your own flesh and blood you're talking about. | I got enough troubles, so don't go adding to them. | I spend every day tending the fields, and what do my daughters do? Nothing! Complain and caterwaul! Sleep and eat! Useless! | Curse my good-for-nothing daughters! My wife was twice the woman they'll ever grow to be. She gave her life birthing them. What a waste. | Good day, Lemkil. I saw some nice dresses for your little girls while I was in Whiterun. I'd be happy to purchase them, if you like. | We don't need your charity, Breton. If my girls deserve something nice, it'll be their father who buys it.

Name: Sissel
description: Sissel is a Nord child living in Rorikstead. She is the daughter of Lemkil and has a twin sister, Britte.
canonical_lines: I wish I could be an adventurer like you, and go wherever I want. | I had a dream that there was a good dragon. He was old and gray, but he wasn't scary. | Most days, I do all I can to stay away from my sister and my father. The beating's the same from either one. | Some day soon I'll stop being afraid. Jouane is teaching me magic. He says I'm real good. | Leave me alone! | Why? What did I do?

Name: Jouane Manette
description: Jouane Manette is an elderly Breton mage living in Rorik's Manor in Rorikstead. Jouane was a healer for the Imperial Legion during Great War, during which he met Rorik when he was brought in from the battlefield, heavily wounded from an engagement with an Aldmeri soldier.
canonical_lines: I'm sure it's hard to believe, but I was once a bold adventurer like you, ready to face any danger. | Secret? What makes you think there's a secret? There are no secrets here, my curious friend. Our prosperity is simply the result of hard work, good fortune and the blessings of the gods. | I was just wondering. The next time we meet, do you think maybe you could teach me some fire magic? Nothing dangerous! Maybe a candle lighting spell? | Oh! I'm... I'm sorry. I didn't mean to upset you. | Shh shh. It's fine, child. It's fine. But we must be cautious, hmm? What we do, the things I teach you. The others wouldn't understand. | I understand. I'm sorry. I just get so excited thinking about it. So... can we. Do some fire magic?

Name: Rorik
description: Rorik, a Nord warrior, is a former member of the Imperial Legion and founder of the small farming community of Rorikstead.
canonical_lines: I was a different man, once -- strong, commanding, ah, and young. But the Great War was a long time ago. | Sorry, I don't mean to be rude but Jouane's the one who deals with people. I'm afraid I lost my charm years ago. | No offense intended, but I don't think we have anything to talk about. | Luck? I think it has more to do with the hard work and good soil. | Maybe you're right. Even so, I can't help wondering if some other force is at work here. | Well done! I don't know where I'd be without you, my old friend.

Name: Filnjar
description: Filnjar is a Nord blacksmith that lives in Shor's Stone. He spends most of his day working at his forge before going to bed at midnight.
canonical_lines: I never asked you to help in the first place. Why would I? Everyone in Skyrim only helps themselves. | If you're looking for supplies, I'd advise heading to Riften. | I hope you haven't arrived here looking for work in the mine. | I hate seeing a good mine go to waste like that, you know? | Tell you what. Keep to your word, and I'll line your pockets with as much as I can scrape up. | I don't want to be responsible for sending you to your death. Be careful in the mine.

Name: Grogmar gro-Burzag
description: Grogmar gro-Burzag is an Orc miner that lives at Shor's Stone. He lives with fellow miner Odfel and will buy iron ore from you.
canonical_lines: All I'm asking is that you clean up once in a while. | You're looking at the best miner in Skyrim. | I'd wager I could crack rock faster than anyone. Even you. | Takes a lot of strength to swing a pick axe, know what I mean? | Aye, I see the look you're giving me. Don't worry, I won't bite. | Damn place is filled with this reddish mist. Can't see more than ten feet in front of your face. But when you can sniff out a vein of iron like me, it isn't too much trouble.

Name: Odfel
description: Odfel is a Nord miner that lives in Shor's Stone and is a potential marriage candidate. Odfel states that he used to be a soldier and acts with a general disdain and smugness towards others.
canonical_lines: You think you're tough, huh? Wandering Skyrim is a picnic compared to tunnel crawling! | Sure, I used to be a soldier... but that was child's play compared to cracking rock. | Mining's my life now, I wouldn't want to do anything else. | All I'm asking is that you clean up once and a while. How you can find anything in your half of the house is beyond me. | I'd rather spend more time in the mine hauling up iron than doing woman's work keeping the house clean. | I'll have you know that I can haul up just as much iron as you in a day and still manage to clean up my messes.

Name: Sylgja
description: Sylgja is a Nord miner of Shor's Stone. Her parents are Verner Rock-Chucker and Annekke Crag-Jumper in Darkwater Crossing.
canonical_lines: I suppose you're used to traveling, being a stranger around here. | I might be a woman, but I can crack rock with the best of them. Be careful in there, you can take a nasty spill. | Ah, yes... seems he sent back my satchel stuffed with letters. I look forward to reading them. I appreciate the delivery, here... I want you to have this. I insist. | I've been watching the way you mine and I have to say, I'm very impressed. | I owe it all to my father who started me swinging the pickaxe when I was a barefoot little girl. | Well, it shows. Your skill rivals some of the greatest miners I've known.

Name: Shor's Stone Guard
description: Shor's Stone Guards are guards that can be found in the settlement of Shor's Stone in the Rift. The guards are strategically placed in the small settlement due to the proximity of Fort Greenwall, located just south of town.

Name: Baldor Iron-Shaper
description: Baldor Iron-Shaper is a Nord living in his house at Skaal Village. He is initially found at the Wind Stone before going missing from the village, where he can be found at an abandoned lodge during the quest A New Source of Stalhrim.
canonical_lines: Please, someone, help me! | I have been taken against my will! I am in need of rescue! | Outsider! I remember you. You're the one who freed the Skaal from the dark spell. Thank the All-Maker that you have come. These accursed elves have taken me from my home. | No, no, my wounds are not serious. I don't think the elves were trying to harm me. Perhaps they intended to frighten me. At worst, I have a few bruises to show for my ordeal. | I can't speak now, friend. I must return home. | It is good to see you again, my friend. Did you find the elves at their ship?

Name: Deor Woodcutter
description: Deor Woodcutter is a Nord living in Skaal Village. He lives with his wife, Yrsa, in their house.
canonical_lines: Something isn't right, Fanari. I feel it in my bones and I smell it in the air. Baldor wouldn't leave without telling someone. | Deor, you must be calm. I'm sure there's a good reason Baldor left us. | It makes my heart heavy that you don't believe me, Fanari. Baldor could be in danger, and you will do nothing. If you won't help me, then I'll ask the All-Maker to send someone else who can. | I am in no mood to talk, outsider. One of the Skaal has gone missing. | Frea... I'm sorry. | Thank you, my friend. You have set us free.

Name: Yrsa
description: Yrsa is a Nord living in Skaal Village. She lives with her husband, Deor Woodcutter in their house.
canonical_lines: I fear what would have happened if you hadn't freed us. | The snowberries are not yet sweet enough. I tasted one just this morning. | Yes, I remember that you ate one of them all by yourself. Maybe this time, you will leave some for the rest of us! | Not if I can help it! | What?! That was supposed to be a gift! I was hoping to surprise you. | If I'd known that I was married to a fox who digs under beds to look for treats, then perhaps I would have.

Name: Edla
description: Edla is a Nord alchemist living in Skaal Village. She lives in her house with her son, Nikulas.
canonical_lines: Who are you? What am I doing here? | I have goods to offer, if you have need. | It's been many winters since my husband returned to the All-Maker, but my heart still aches from the loss. | It brings me great comfort to know that Nikulas will stay. I thank you, outsider. | My son and I gather items to trade with travelers who visit the village. | My son's heart was restless. He wanted to see the world beyond our lands, and nothing I said could change his mind.

Name: Nikulas
description: Nikulas was a Nord warrior from the Second Era. He and four companions embarked on a quest to find Sovngarde.

Name: Fanari Strong-Voice
description: Fanari Strong-Voice is a Nord living in the Greathall at Skaal Village. She is the chief of the village.
canonical_lines: I've met a few Nords from Skyrim. They thought us strange, but in our hearts, I don't think we are so different. | I must get back to the village. As leader of the Skaal, I'm needed there. | As leader of the Skaal, I name you friend to our people. You are welcome here. | I'm the leader of the Skaal, but it's the All-Maker who truly protects and provides. | If I must die to protect my people, so be it! | All-Maker, give me strength!

Name: Tharstan
description: Tharstan is an elderly historian and author currently residing in Skaal Village on Solstheim. He wrote the book Children of the All-Maker and is currently working on the definitive history of the Skaal.
canonical_lines: It's hard to explain, but as much as I have come to think of Skaal Village as a second home, I do still miss Skyrim. | I do enjoy sharing stories of my travels in Tamriel with young Nikulas. | I came here to study the history of Solstheim, but it's the Skaal who intrigue me the most. | I've tried to interest the villagers in reading and history, but I haven't had much luck. | Well, let me think... I suppose it's been nearly a year now. My goodness, how the time has flown! | Well, not so far. They think I'm a bit strange, but they seem to tolerate me. In fact, they've been very accommodating. Hospitable, even. They seem happy to talk about their traditions and history.

Name: Morwen
description: Morwen is a Nord living in Skaal Village. She works as an apprentice to the smith Baldor Iron-Shaper during the day.
canonical_lines: My mother was Skaal, but she left the village and I was born in Skyrim. | I cannot deny it. You remind me of all the things I miss about Skyrim, and my heart beats a little quicker when you are near. Do you feel the same? | It's hard to explain, but as much as I have come to think of Skaal Village as a second home, I do still miss Skyrim. | For returning my mother's necklace, you have my gratitude. It means more to me than you can know. | I've told young Nikulas that the world beyond our lands is no place for the Skaal, but he won't listen. | Did you think I would run?

Name: Aeta
description: Aeta, a Nord child, is the daughter of Oslaf and Finna. She lives in her family's house in Skaal Village.
canonical_lines: I want to be a great hunter like Wulf. I practice stalking prey on the rabbits and the foxes in the woods. | Mother worries when I walk too far from the village. She says a dragon might snatch me up, but I'm not afraid. | Papa, when can I go on my first hunt? | I've told you before, little cub, you're not old enough yet. | I just want to see. I promise not to get in the way of the hunters, and I'm not afraid of the beasts in the forest. | I have given my answer, little cub. I know you are brave and have the heart of a great she-wolf, but all things have a time and place.

Name: Finna
description: Finna is a Nord living at Oslaf's house in Skaal Village with her husband Oslaf and their daughter Aeta. She wears a Skaal coat with matching boots and hat.
canonical_lines: I welcome you, friend of the Skaal. | The dragons of old have returned! By the All-Maker, I hope they will leave our village alone. | There's a terrible ache in my back today. | Complaining to me won't make your pain go away, Oslaf. Go and see Edla, perhaps she has a remedy. | There's no time for that now, I have work to do. | Are the potatoes ready for eating? I want to roast them with some onions for the night's meal.

Name: Oslaf
description: Oslaf is a Nord found laboring at the Temple of Miraak with Yrsa during the quest The Temple of Miraak.
canonical_lines: The others call you a friend, but I still see an outsider. | You always protected us. I hope you find peace in the next life. Goodbye, old one. | You brought this thing into our village. I do not know why Storn trusted you, but he did. Make sure he did not die for nothing. | There's a terrible ache in my back today. | Complaining to me won't make your pain go away, Oslaf. Go and see Edla, perhaps she has a remedy. | There's no time for that now, I have work to do.

Name: Frea
description: Frea is a Nord living in Skaal Village. She is the daughter of Storn Crag-Strider, the village's shaman, and will replace him after his death.
canonical_lines: , can you hear me? , I'm here to help you! | You must listen to me! We must leave this place! | I am Frea of the Skaal. I am here to either save my people, or avenge them. | I do not wish to imagine the kinds of things that happened in this chamber. | Are you ready to help me now? We should not delay. We should check these rooms for supplies before heading further into the temple. I shall look around. We can proceed when you are ready. | Take your time. I shall follow when you are ready.

Name: Storn Crag-Strider
description: Storn Crag-Strider is the elderly shaman of Skaal Village and the father of Frea. As shaman of the tribe he serves as both guide and healer and makes sure the villagers adhere to Skaal tradition, particularly the worship of the All-Maker.
canonical_lines: Father! I have returned! There is yet hope! | No, but I have brought someone who has seen things... He/She has confirmed that Miraak is indeed behind the suffering of our people. | I feared that it would be so. | I fear there is too much we do not yet know. | So, you have seen things, yes? My magic grows weak, and so does the barrier around our village. Time is short. Tell me what you know. | I cannot maintain the barrier for much longer.

Name: Wulf Wild-Blood
description: Wulf Wild-Blood is a Nord warrior living in his house at Skaal Village. He is a master trainer for Two-handed.
canonical_lines: I am called Wulf Wild-Blood. I am First Hunter of the Skaal. | I know a warrior when I see one, friend of the Skaal. You have the heart of a mighty bear. | The first piece of wisdom I teach to any hunter of the Skaal is to ask the simple question, should I truly kill this beast? We take only what we need, and so we preserve the oneness with the land. | You're a fool to test me, outsider. | You will not break me, outsider. | I have slain more dangerous creatures than you!

Name: Chief Burguk
description: Chief Burguk, an Orc warrior, is the chief of Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold south of Markarth. He is the master trainer in One-handed and can train you up to level 90.
canonical_lines: You'll never compare to me, but I can try and teach you anyway. | My chief, Gharol threatens to have me work in the mines. You won't allow my pretty hands to dirty, will you? | No, my wife. You have been given other gifts to please your chief than mine work. I will talk to Gharol and all will be well. | Oh, thank you my chief! | Do they, my chief? Am I now favored enough to replace Shel by your side at the feast? Back your words with action! | No more talk of Shel. As chief, I will do what I please, so point your fiery gaze to our enemies.

Name: Arob
description: Arob is an Orc warrior and the hunts-wife of Chief Burguk in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth.
canonical_lines: I am the hunts-wife of this stronghold. | Ah, the air is good today. I welcome the smell of blood from all the kills I will make. | Patience, my son. The hunter not welcome the blood of his prey, he waits for it. | Yes, mother. I'm eager to prove my skills today. | Burguk is a fine chief. He brings strength and wealth to the stronghold. | Murbul knows many poisons and cures if you need them.

Name: Gharol
description: Gharol is an Orc blacksmith living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. She is the forge-wife of Chief Burguk and mother of Umurn and Lash.
canonical_lines: Sorry, mother. I'll focus on my work. | Do they, my chief? Am I now favored enough to replace Shel by your side at the feast? Back your words with action! | No more talk of Shel. As chief, I will do what I please, so point your fiery gaze to our enemies. | I'm Burguk's forge-wife. I shape all the steel for the stronghold. | As forge-wife, I'm also in charge of our mine. | I saw you working the forge today, wife. Your muscles have grown strong from the metal shaping!

Name: Ghorbash the Iron Hand
description: Ghorbash the Iron Hand is an Orc ranger and the brother of Chief Burguk. Due to his adventurous nature, he served the Legion for years but has now returned to his family in the Orc Stronghold Dushnikh Yal.
canonical_lines: I used to wander the corners of Skyrim like you. I miss those days. | Me? I'm Burguk's brother. I came back after serving many years in the Legion. By then, Burguk had already become chief, and he welcomed me home as family, not a rival as is tradition. | I do. There is a freedom the roads give you that the stronghold does not. But I have a place here, and I wouldn't want to dishonor my clan by leaving again like some young pup. | Serving in the Legion taught me to respect leadership. The stronghold needs Burguk. | We honor the bravest fighters, but I have seen many types of bravery in my travels. | I am an Orc and a warrior, but I have no desire to become chief.

Name: Murbul
description: Murbul is an Orc destruction mage and wise woman of Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. She is the mother of Chief Burguk and also functions as the local apothecary, selling a variety of merchandise if you are blood-kin of the orcs.
canonical_lines: I have an old cure for Rockjoint. Common in little Orc children. | I am Burguk's mother and wise woman to our tribe, outlander. | Tell me, mother, does Malacath favor our stronghold? | Orc poisons are to be feared, if you wish to trade. | Malacath rewards the strong and punishes the weak. | He is pleased. Ours is the strongest tribe in all the Reach.

Name: Nagrub
description: Nagrub is an Orc ranger and the son of Chief Burguk, the leader of Orc Stronghold Dushnikh Yal southeast of Markarth.
canonical_lines: I help my mother Arob with the hunt. We bring much meat and skins to the stronghold. | Brother Umurn is a strong warrior. I look forward to fighting him for chiefdom one day. | One day, I intend to be chief. I will fight my father and my brother for it, as is tradition. | Ah, the air is good today. I welcome the smell of blood from all the kills I will make. | Patience, my son. The hunter not welcome the blood of his prey, he waits for it. | Yes, mother. I'm eager to prove my skills today.

Name: Shel
description: Shel is an Orc warrior and the third wife of Chief Burguk in the Orc stronghold of Dushnikh Yal.
canonical_lines: I am Burguk's favored wife. He knows my beauty should be praised. | Umurn and Nagrub will be held up as weak next to the son I will one day bear for my chief. | My chief, Gharol threatens to have me work in the mines. You won't allow my pretty hands to dirty, will you? | No, my wife. You have been given other gifts to please your chief than mine work. I will talk to Gharol and all will be well. | Oh, thank you my chief!

Name: Dulug
description: Dulug is an Orc warrior living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. She works in Dushnikh Mine, mining orichalcum ore along with Ghak, Mahk, and Oglub.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Ghak
description: Ghak is an Orc warrior living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. She works as a miner in Dushnikh Mine, mining orichalcum ore along with Dulug, Mahk, and Oglub.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Mahk
description: Mahk is an Orc warrior living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. He works in Dushnikh Mine, mining orichalcum ore along with Ghak, Dulug, and Oglub.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Oglub
description: Oglub is an aging Orc warrior living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. He is the brother of Ghorbash the Iron Hand, but seems to have outgrown his chance to become chief of the stronghold.
canonical_lines: Serving in the Legion taught me to respect leadership. The stronghold needs Burguk. | I serve my chief and my brothers by working in the mines. It's the only place fit for an aging Orc. | I don't know how Ghorbash has so much spirit. He should act his age. | You could challenge Burguk, my brother. Yours is the stronger swordarm. | This metal will serve the forge well, my brother. | Sorry, outlander, but this old Orc cannot help you. Burguk is the chief here.

Name: Umurn
description: Umurn is an Orc warrior living in Dushnikh Yal, the Orc stronghold southeast of Markarth. He works the forge along with his mother, Gharol.
canonical_lines: One day I will shape a weapon fit for a chief. Maybe that chief will be me. | One day, I must fight my brother Nagrub for chiefdom. It will not be easy. | Sorry, mother. I'll focus on my work. | I work the forge, with my mother Gharol. We mine our own ore and shape our own metal. | I help in the mines as well as the forge. | Yes, mother.

Name: Chief Yamarz
description: Chief Yamarz is an Orc warrior and the chief of the accursed Orc stronghold of Largashbur, located in the Rift, east of Avanchnzel. He is generally unpleasant and displays many traits not normally associated with Orcs such as a conniving nature and an aversion to battle.
canonical_lines: Curses aren't enough, now I must suffer you too? What is it? | Weeks? Longer? It feels like an age has gone by. I haven't slept in so long. | You bring an outsider here, and now insist I call on Malacath for help, when he has clearly forsaken me? You try my patience, Atub. | Malacath has heard my pleas! He speaks to us! | You dare summon me, Yamarz? | Very well. You, outsider, come here! I want a word.

Name: Atub
description: Atub is an Orc sorceress living in Largashbur. She offers expert training in Illusion after completion of The Cursed Tribe quest.
canonical_lines: Yamarz charged me with keeping outsiders away from Largashbur. You would have me disobey him? | You were charged with keeping us inside the walls. Have faith, Ugor. I only wish the best for our tribe. | We have been on our own for some time now. I fear we will not survive. | You have returned. Will you now aid me in contacting Malacath? | Excellent. Now, you must come with me. You've become a part of this. You must be present for the ritual. | You bring an outsider here, and now insist I call on Malacath for help, when he has clearly forsaken me? You try my patience, Atub.

Name: Garakh
description: Garakh is an Orc blacksmith living in Largashbur, the Orc stronghold of the Rift.
canonical_lines: Every blade I make honors Malacath. Every rivet, every plate of armor is for him. | Lob will one day take my place, and bring honor to our tribe as I have. | Only a true Orc knows how to temper Orichalcum properly. | The old traditions are passed down from one generation to the next. The secrets of smithing are passed down as well. | We have angered Malacath, and so we must be punished.

Name: Gularzob
description: Gularzob is an Orc warrior found in Largashbur, the Orc stronghold of the Rift. At first, he's just a simple guard but then becomes chosen by Malacath to be the new Chieftain after the curse on Largashbur has been lifted.
canonical_lines: I will do my best to lead the tribe, but I don't know why Malacath chose me. | I am honored to have been chosen to lead. But I know that being picked by Malacath does not mean that I am ready. | Do not raise arms against my people, and you shall always have a place here, Champion of Malacath. | Atub is wise beyond her years. I take her advice seriously, and you should as well. | We have sworn loyalty to Yamarz. He will see us through these dark times.

Name: Lob
description: Lob is an Orc ranger living in Largashbur, the Orc Stronghold of the Rift. He is usually found tending to the livestock or other maintenance during the day, and at night in the longhouse.
canonical_lines: I learn much from Garakh every day. I must learn if I am to take her place. | I've worked with metal long enough that I almost never burn myself anymore. | My weapons will someday be as strong as my mother's, and Malacath will be pleased with me. | By the Ashpit, we can't go on like this.

Name: Ogol
description: Ogol is an Orc warrior found in Largashbur. He is easy to spot among the other Orcs as his apparel is more akin to a city dweller than someone in an Orc stronghold.
canonical_lines: I am... surprised that Gularzob was named chief. | I will serve Gularzob as best I can, even though I am his elder. | Our tribe has survived this long without you interfering. We'll be fine. | We are all blood here. One family, one tribe.

Name: Ugor
description: Ugor is an Orc ranger found in Largashbur, the Orc stronghold of the Rift.
canonical_lines: Yamarz charged me with keeping outsiders away from Largashbur. You would have me disobey him? | You were charged with keeping us inside the walls. Have faith, Ugor. I only wish the best for our tribe. | Halt! You have no business here, outsider. Leave at once. | Ugor, no! This may be the one we need. | We need nothing from outsiders! Yamarz will provide for us. | We cannot carry on this way! You know we are doomed if we do not do something!

Name: Chief Larak
description: Chief Larak is the Orc warrior and chieftain of the Mor Khazgur Orc stronghold. He is a master shield-bearer and can thus train you in the art of Block up to skill level 90.
canonical_lines: I served in the Legion. Perhaps I'll show you some of their technique one of these days. | My place is chief and my challenge is to lead my people. | I'm a strict follower of the old traditions. Honor, strength, deeds. | I am honored. | It's simple Orc smithing practice, my chief. Nothing that hasn't been passed down for years. | Thank you, my chief.

Name: Bagrak
description: Bagrak is an Orc warrior living in Mor Khazgur. She is the daughter of Sharamph, and thus the sister of Chief Larak.
canonical_lines: You should see my mother, Sharamph, if you need a cure or a poison. | Follow me. And don't stop until the dominant male is dead. | Follow me, outlander. | A short hunt, but you did well. Here, on behalf of my late husband. | I'll meet you back at the stronghold. | Larak is strong, but he has much to prove as chief.

Name: Borgakh the Steel Heart
description: Borgakh the Steel Heart is an Orc warrior and potential follower found in Mor Khazgur. During the day, she can be found using the training dummy in front of Larak's Longhouse, and at night, sleeping inside.
canonical_lines: Perhaps I'll join the Legion one day, as my father had done. | I envy you, outlander. You can choose to leave if you wish. | Soon, I will be of age. The taste is bitter. | I couldn't. It would shame my chief, and mother, and foremothers. | You're right. Mauloch teaches us to meet our fate. Perhaps this is mine.

Name: Sharamph
description: Sharamph, an Orc destruction mage, is wise woman of Mor Khazgur, the Orc stronghold west of Solitude. She is the mother of Chief Larak and Bagrak.
canonical_lines: I am wise woman to this stronghold. | I have poisons for your weapons, and cures for your ills. | If you wish to trade, see me during daylight. | I am honored. | Our chief is strong. That is all that matters. | Poisons can kill your enemies faster than any blade.

Name: Shuftharz
description: Shuftharz is an Orc blacksmith living in Mor Khazgur. She will only trade with you if you are Blood-Kin to the Orcs.
canonical_lines: Thank you, my chief. | The forge is strong and so is our chief, Larak. I'm content. | My son, Olur, learns the forge well. His work brings me pride. | You need some armor, outlander? | How about an axe? Malacath smiles on the axe-wielder. | We can trade in the morning, outlander.

Name: Ghamorz
description: Ghamorz is an Orc miner who lives in the Orc stronghold of Mor Khazgur. He works in Mor Khazgur Mine, an orichalcum mine located in the stronghold, with Gul and Olur.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Gul
description: Gul is an Orc miner that lives in the Orc stronghold of Mor Khazgur. She works in Mor Khazgur Mine, an orichalcum mine located in the stronghold, with Ghamorz and Olur.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Olur
description: Olur is an Orc ranger living in the Orc stronghold of Mor Khazgur, found west of Solitude and northeast of Markarth. He is the son of tribe leader Chief Larak and his forgewife Shuftharz.
canonical_lines: I served in the Legion. Perhaps I'll show you some of their techniques one of these days. | Mother tells me to shape metal with focus and strength. | It's simple Orc smithing practice, my chief. Nothing that hasn't been passed down for years. | I work in the forge and the mines. Mother says it pleases her and our people. | Even good hammers warp metal if struck without care.

Name: Chief Mauhulakh
description: Chief Mauhulakh is an Orc warrior and Chieftain of Narzulbur, the Orc stronghold of Eastmarch. His stronghold runs the Gloombound Mine, which is rich in ebony ore.
canonical_lines: The blessings of the mine have been many, but I have no mate to share them. | Been married many times but the gods keep taking them from me. | Bolar, I must ask you something. | Have the spirits told you where I may find a wife? One who will be safe from this curse? | Oh, all things in time, my boy. All things in time. What more do you need that Yatul and I cannot provide? | I need more children.

Name: Bolar
description: Bolar is an Orc mage and wise woman of Narzulbur, the Orc stronghold of Eastmarch.
canonical_lines: I've read the entrails many times, but can't fathom why Mauhulakh's wives keep finding tragedy. | Urog and Dushnamub were such lovely children. I held them as they watched their mothers die after birth. They know me best, now. | Yatul and I tend to dote on Mauhulakh. You know how aunts can be with their favorite nephew. | I hear Mauhulakh is wandering again. He's after a new woman. | That wasn't what I meant. | Once she's with child, I will not harm her.

Name: Dushnamub
description: Dushnamub is an Orc warrior and resident blacksmith for Narzulbur, the Orc stronghold in Eastmarch. He is the son of Chief Mauhulakh, and brother of Urog.
canonical_lines: Haven't you seen how my aunts act with my father? It's beyond strange. | I never knew my mother, but I doubt she ever acted as affectionate with my father as Yatul and Bolar do. | My sister is blind. I told her not to spend so much time with Yatul, but she won't listen. Thinks she's nice. | They are good women. They love me. You will speak no more ill of them. | I've just never heard of a midwife losing all her mothers like that. | Father, I'm worried about Gadba and Mul.

Name: Urog
description: Urog is an Orc ranger living in Narzulbur, the Orc stronghold of Eastmarch. She is the daughter of the tribe's chieftain, Mauhulakh, and sister to Dushnamub.
canonical_lines: Yatul's been teaching me to hunt. I'm still learning, but she's the best teacher I could have. | My brother keeps trying to spin these fantasies on me about our aunts and our father. He's crazy. | Sometimes I wonder if my aunts are right about my father -- he does seem weak. | Come, child, I will tell you how to track a snow cat. | That's what everyone keeps saying. But you didn't kill her. That's what I was asking. | What about my father? Was he a good hunter?

Name: Yatul
description: Yatul is an Orc ranger of Narzulbur, the Orc stronghold of Eastmarch. She is an aunt to the tribe's Chieftain, Mauhulakh.
canonical_lines: Mauhulakh. He wants to be a leader, but spends too much time moping over women. Bolar and I should be all he needs. | I know I sound abrasive. It's just that I love Mauhulakh so much that I want us to be happy together. | I hear Mauhulakh is wandering again. He's after a new woman. | That wasn't what I meant. | Once she's with child, I will not harm her. | They are good, loyal children.

Name: Bor
description: Bor is an Orc miner who lives and works in Narzulbur at Gloombound Mine. She spends her time mining the ebony ore there.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Gadba gro-Largash
description: Gadba gro-Largash is an Orc warrior found working in Narzulbur's Gloombound Mine. He stays inside the mine all the time, never eating or sleeping, though he occasionally sits for a break.
canonical_lines: Mul is the smart one. I go where he tells me. | When we go back to Largashbur we'll be kings. I like Narzulbur, but don't tell Mul. | But I thought there was only one chief. | I found a big load of ebony at the bottom pocket in the mine. | No, I don't need to mark it. I remember it. | Sometimes I think your head is made of rocks.

Name: Mogdurz
description: Mogdurz is an Orc miner who works in Gloombound Mine, right next to Narzulbur. She spends her whole day mining the ebony and iron ore veins in the caves.
canonical_lines: I'm here to mine, outlander. So unless you want to dig, get out. | I have metal to dig. | Malacath has given me the task to mine. Good ore brings strength to our people. | Every Orc learns the heavy labor of mining. All spend years in the caves. | The mines are hard, but Malacath rewards those who rise to the challenge.

Name: Mul gro-Largash
description: Mul gro-Largash is an Orc warrior found in Narzulbur's Gloombound Mine. He stays in the mine all the time, sometimes sitting to take a break, but never eating or sleeping.
canonical_lines: Gadba and me came to work the mine. The plan is to get rich and then go back to Largashbur and take over! | But I thought there was only one chief. | I found a big load of ebony at the bottom pocket in the mine. | No, I don't need to mark it. I remember it. | Sometimes I think your head is made of rocks. | That would be good! I could use it to smash other rocks. Easier to mine, then.

Name: Legate Constantius Tituleius
description: Legate Constantius Tituleius is an Imperial soldier who can be found in Pale Imperial Camp. Should the Imperials take control of Dawnstar he will move to the White Hall.

Name: Legate Fasendil
description: Legate Fasendil, a High Elf soldier, is the Imperial Legion officer in charge of operations in the Rift. His initial camp is located due south of Ivarstead, and he can later be found in Mistveil Keep in Riften should the Legion claim the Rift.
canonical_lines: For the glory of the Empire.

Name: Legate Hrollod
description: Legate Hrollod is a Nord soldier commanding the Eastmarch Imperial Camp. He spends all his time in the camp and is not hostile toward you, unless you spend too long in the camp and aren't a member of the Imperial Legion.

Name: Legate Sevan Telendas
description: Legate Sevan Telendas is a Dark Elf soldier and the field commander of Winterhold Imperial Camp. He can be found either in his tent, or planning the war effort in a tent with a map of Skyrim.

Name: Arrald Frozen-Heart
description: Arrald Frozen-Heart is a Nord soldier and the commander of the Hjaalmarch Stormcloak Camp. If Hjaalmarch is taken by the Stormcloaks, he will relocate to the hold capital, Morthal, where he will spend most of the day in the Jarl's longhouse directing the war effort, and sleep in the local guardhouse.

Name: Gonnar Oath-Giver
description: Gonnar Oath-Giver is a Nord soldier and a Stormcloak commander. Initially, he is found at Mistveil Keep.

Name: Istar Cairn-Breaker
description: Istar Cairn-Breaker is a Nord soldier and the commanding officer of the Haafingar Stormcloak Camp. His tent is larger than the small one man tents the regular Stormcloak Soldiers have and contains a chest and an end table.

Name: Kottir Red-Shoal
description: Kottir Red-Shoal is a Nord soldier, and commander of the Reach Stormcloak Camp. Should the Stormcloaks take control of Markarth, he will relocate to Understone Keep.

Name: Thorygg Sun-Killer
description: Thorygg Sun-Killer is a Nord soldier and the leader of the Falkreath Stormcloak Camp. He commands nine soldiers, of which three are wounded, and a quartermaster.

Name: General Falx Carius
description: General Falx Carius is an Imperial warrior found in the ruins of Fort Frostmoth.

Name: Maximian Axius
description: Maximian Axius was a soldier serving under General Falx Carius at Fort Frostmoth just before the Red Mountain erupted. Trapped in the fort by debris, his skeleton can be found with his knapsack and a series of letters to his wife, Selina.

Name: Ildari Sarothril
description: Ildari Sarothril is a Dark Elf conjurer residing at Highpoint Tower. She is a former apprentice of Neloth, but now bears a grudge against him.
canonical_lines: You've gone far enough. Neloth is a fool to think he could send some low life to finish me off. | Ugh! The heart stone protects me! | So Neloth is afraid to face me himself! | Pawn of Neloth!

Name: Niyya
description: Niyya is a Redguard sorceress who can be found in the prison of Highpoint Tower. She is being held prisoner by Ildari Sarothril.
canonical_lines: Please! You've got to get me out of here before she comes back. | Help! Please, help me! | Thank you for rescuing me. That witch was going to kill me soon, I just know it. | Horrible things. Experiments...and worse. I'm the last one. The others are all dead now. If you find her, don't make her end quick. | First I'm going to leave this place, as fast as I can. Then I'm going to get on the first boat to the mainland. Good luck to you. | Thank you for rescuing me from .

Name: Derkeethus
description: Derkeethus is an Argonian ranger and a miner of Darkwater Crossing in Eastmarch. Several residents of Darkwater Crossing may tell you he has gone missing before you find him in Darkwater Pass, being held captive by Falmer.
canonical_lines: Derkeethus used to take me diving way down deep in the river. I miss him, | Derkeethus, from Darkwater Crossing. Should have known better than to swim all the way to the falls. Please, get me out of here! | Thanks! I'm out! | I will wait. | Lead. I'll follow. | I have a feeling there's going to be trouble.

Name: Hrefna
description: Hrefna is a Nord child who lives with her mother Tormir at the small mining settlement, Darkwater Crossing.
canonical_lines: Mom says the Empire is mean, but I don't think they're that bad. | I don't want to hear another word about what you're learning from the elf! It's high time you learned to be a Nord, too! | I've been in Skyrim my whole life. Why would I want to leave? | I don't want to hear another word about what you're learning from the Argonian! It's high time you learned to be a Nord, too! | Hi! I've never seen you around here before. Are you a miner too? | Sondas takes care of me when mom's not around.

Name: Sondas Drenim
description: Sondas Drenim is a Dark Elf food vendor and a resident of Darkwater Crossing who works as a miner at Goldenrock Mine. He's on friendly terms with his fellow miners and seems to be happy with the settlement's lakeside location.
canonical_lines: I've been in Skyrim my whole life. Why would I want to leave? | I try to think of it as coaxing the ore from the rock. | I keep hearing stories about Morrowind.
