Name: Raleth Eldri
description: Raleth Eldri is a dead Dark Elf conjurer found in a tent outside of Kagrumez. His notes can be found within the ruins.

Name: Captain Avidius
description: Captain Avidius is a Redguard Penitus Oculatus who is found on The Katariah during the quest Hail Sithis!. He wears clothes with a pair of boots and is armed with an Imperial sword.

Name: Lieutenant Salvarus
description: Lieutenant Salvarus is an Imperial from Cyrodiil and a ranking Penitus Oculatus member onboard the Emperor's personal ship The Katariah. He carries a Katariah Master Key that will be useful during the related quest.

Name: Sailor
description: Sailors are Nord citizens who are found on ships. They will patrol their ships, but are not hostile towards you.

Name: Ancarion
description: Ancarion, a High Elf wizard, is the leader of the Thalmor on Solstheim. He is attempting to locate a source of stalhrim for the Thalmor.
canonical_lines: You are interfering with official Thalmor business. You will leave immediately if you value your well-being. | Get out of here, before I lose my patience. | Leave at once! Do not test me, or I promise that you will regret it. | You dare to question me? That insult will be your last! | You dare threaten me? For that insolence, I will flay the flesh from your bones! | Here to make me an offer, then? Very well, what do you have in mind?

Name: Falas Selvayn
description: Falas Selvayn is a Dark Elf trader who can be found at the Ramshackle Trading Post between the hours of midnight and 5am.
canonical_lines: Sometimes things fall off the back of a cart. I find them, clean them up and resell them. | Who am I? Who are you? Buy something or keep moving.

Name: Erlendr
description: Erlendr, a Nord warrior, is one of the souls in the Hall of Valor. He was turned to stone by the wizard Grimkell, along with Hunroor and Nikulas, while on a quest to find Sovngarde.

Name: Felldir the Old
description: Felldir the Old, a Nord warrior, is an ancient hero currently residing in the Hall of Valor in Sovngarde. He was one of the warriors, along with Gormlaith Golden-Hilt and Hakon One-Eye, who fought against Alduin, ultimately sending him forward through time using an Elder Scroll.
canonical_lines: To battle, my friends! The fields will echo with the clamor of war, our wills undaunted. | We've bloodied him well. Four of his kin have fallen to my blade alone this day. | They did not have Dragonrend. Once we bring him down, I promise I will have his head. | You do not understand. Alduin cannot be slain like a lesser dragon. He is beyond our strength. Which is why I brought the Elder Scroll. | I never agreed. And if you are right, I will not need it. | Alduin escaped us long ago. Today we take our well-tempered revenge. For a hundred lifetimes my heart has burned for revenge on Alduin too long delayed.

Name: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt
description: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, a Nord warrior, is an ancient hero currently residing in the Hall of Valor in Sovngarde. She was one of the warriors, along with Felldir the Old and Hakon One-Eye, who fought against Alduin, ultimately sending him forward through time using an Elder Scroll.
canonical_lines: If I die today, it will not be in terror. You feel fear for the first time, worm. I see it in your eyes. Skyrim will be free! | To battle, my friends! The fields will echo with the clamor of war, our wills undaunted. | I serve the Dragonborn. | Lead me into battle. | . Today Alduin's lordship will be restored. But I honor your courage. . Die now, in vain. | The battle below goes ill. If Alduin does not rise to our challenge, I fear all may be lost.

Name: Hakon One-Eye
description: Hakon One-Eye, a Nord warrior, is an ancient hero currently residing in the Hall of Valor in Sovngarde. He was one of the warriors, along with Gormlaith Golden-Hilt and Felldir the Old, who fought against Alduin, ultimately sending him forward through time using an Elder Scroll.
canonical_lines: If I die today, it will not be in terror. You feel fear for the first time, worm. I see it in your eyes. Skyrim will be free! | To battle, my friends! The fields will echo with the clamor of war, our wills undaunted. | . Today Alduin's lordship will be restored. But I honor your courage. . Die now, in vain. | The battle below goes ill. If Alduin does not rise to our challenge, I fear all may be lost. | We've bloodied him well. Four of his kin have fallen to my blade alone this day. | They did not have Dragonrend. Once we bring him down, I promise I will have his head.

Name: Hunroor
description: Hunroor was a Nord warrior from the Second Era. He and four companions embarked on a quest to find Sovngarde.

Name: Jurgen Windcaller
description: Jurgen Windcaller is a Nord hero who can be found in Sovngarde. He wears Greybeard's robes along with a matching pair of boots.
canonical_lines: My disciples still follow the difficult path - the Way of the Voice is neither wide, nor easy. But if you stray from wisdom then to Sovngarde you will not return. | Fate drives you, but you follow your own path. Choose wisely, lest you wander into evil.

Name: Ulfgar the Unending
description: Ulfgar the Unending is a Nord warrior from the Second Era, believed to have been a member of Ysgramor's Five Hundred Companions. For more information, see the lore article.

Name: High King Torygg
canonical_lines: Do you know the way? I'm weary and lost. | Beware! The World-Eater waits within the mist! | Turn back! Before he finds you! | There is no escape. Courage is useless. | The mist is gone! A glorious day! | The World-Eater is dead! The way is now clear!

Name: Stormcloak Soldier
description: This Stormcloak Soldier is a Nord scout who will be encountered in Sovngarde during the related quest.
canonical_lines: Follow me. I'll lead you through this mist. | I'll try to hold to your hopeful purpose. Quickly, before this encompassing fog once more snares me in the World-Eater's net! | Don't worry, I'm here to kill Alduin. | In life I felled foes unnumbered, fearless in battle; but no blade can defend against the terror of this gloom-stricken valley. | Do you know the way? I'm weary and lost. | Turn back, traveler! Terror waits within this mist!

Name: Svaknir
description: Svaknir is the ghost of a bard found in Dead Men's Respite. He wears a set of merchant clothes and a pair of boots.

Name: Tsun
description: Tsun is the Nordic god of trials against adversity. Shield-thane of Shor, he serves as the guardian of the Whalebone Bridge to the Hall of Valor.
canonical_lines: By right of birth. I am Dragonborn. | Ah! It's been too long since last I faced a doom-driven hero of the dragon blood. | By right of glory. I lead the Companions of Jorrvaskr. | I welcome the chance to challenge the blade of Ysgramor's heir, honored shield-brother/sister to Kodlak Whitemane, whom I've watched for in vain. | By right of cleverness. I am Master of the College of Winterhold. | Well met, mage of Skyrim. The Nords may have forgotten their forefathers' respect for the Clever Craft, but your comrades throng this hall. Here in Shor's house we honor it still.

Name: Ri'saad
description: Ri'saad is a Khajiit pawnbroker, accompanied by Atahbah, Khayla and Ma'randru-jo. His caravan is found traveling the roads of Skyrim between Whiterun and Markarth, stopping outside of each city and setting up tents for two full days before moving on.
canonical_lines: Welcome. If I cannot serve you, I am sure that one of my other traders can do so. | I have traveled far across Tamriel to serve you. | Perhaps you have encountered Ma'dran or ? Both are sworn to me, and both have worthy goods to offer. | Ah. You must mean that one over there. He's not one of us. Thalmor filth, eh? Giving all Khajiit a bad name. | Yes, I've heard the Guild is rising back to power. An alliance would be most beneficial to both parties. I'll consider the offer, but I'll have to discuss it with the other caravans. | Was there anything else, or is our transaction complete?

Name: Khayla
description: Khayla is a Khajiit warrior who follows Ri'saad's trade caravan. She's the common-level trainer in Sneak.
canonical_lines: They'll never see you coming.

Name: Atahbah
description: Atahbah is a Khajiit pawnbroker in Ri'saad's trade caravan. She will become a fence for Thieves Guild members after completing the quest Thieves Guild Caravan Fence Quest.

Name: Ma'randru-jo
description: Ma'randru-jo is a Khajiit elemental mage who travels around Skyrim with a trade caravan, which includes Ri'saad, Atahbah and Khayla. When the caravan is camped, he can be found wandering around the campsite.
canonical_lines: And why would you be looking for me, hmm? I'm not sure I appreciate your presence here. Friend. | Purchase something or leave. Those are your options. | What? You dare challenge Ma'randru-jo? You will suffer for your insolence! | Now aren't you a strange one. Well, if you're here to shop, shop. If not, find some other caravan to stalk.

Name: Ahkari
description: Ahkari is a Khajiit pawnbroker that leads one of three Khajiit trade caravans owned by Ri'saad. Her caravan stops at Riften and Dawnstar, and includes Zaynabi, Dro'marash, and Kharjo.
canonical_lines: So many refuse to talk to us. They call us thieves and smugglers. I am glad to see that you are not such a one.

Name: Dro'marash
description: Dro'marash is a Khajiit warrior who follows Ahkari's trade caravan. He can be found walking the roads between Dawnstar and Riften, or camped outside either city.
canonical_lines: Well, you've come to the right place.

Name: Kharjo
description: Kharjo is a Khajiit warrior who guards and travels with the rest of the trade caravan led by Ahkari. He can be found outside either Dawnstar or Riften, and walks the route in between.
canonical_lines: You are kind to offer. We believe the bandits are a part of a group headquartered here. Be careful. I miss my amulet, but a life cannot be replaced as easily. | There it is. Ah.... Home.... If you ever need the skills of a Khajiit warrior by your side, I would be honored to travel with you. Until then, here. This is for you, in thanks. | If anyone sneaks up on us, I'll smell them coming. Or I might not. | You're taking us somewhere warm, I trust? | We've found a cave. I don't think there are warm fires and friendly faces inside. | Ah! I feel like I just woke from a nap.

Name: Zaynabi
description: Zaynabi is a Khajiit scout who follows Ahkari's trade caravan. She will serve as a fence for Thieves Guild members after the Thieves Guild Caravan Fence Quest is completed.

Name: Ma'dran
description: Ma'dran is a Khajiit pawnbroker and the leader of his trade caravan. He travels with Ma'jhad and Ra'zhinda between Windhelm and Solitude.
canonical_lines: How can I argue with that? | Okay, okay. You've talked me into it. | That is the truth. | Okay. Just this once. | Ma'dran's route is unique in that he shares a common stop with Ri'saad's caravan: Windhelm, However, Ma'dran's route runs from Windhelm to Solitude instead of to Markarth.

Name: Ma'jhad
description: Ma'jhad is a Khajiit warrior who travels with Ma'dran's trade caravan. He can sometimes be found outside Solitude or Windhelm and is an expert-level trainer in Lockpicking.
canonical_lines: All right, but if you get arrested don't blame it on me.

Name: Ra'zhinda
description: Ra'zhinda is a Khajiit warrior who travels with the trade caravan with Ma'dran and Ma'jhad, between Solitude and Windhelm.

Name: Agent Lorcalin
description: Agent Lorcalin is a Thalmor wizard that can be found near a shrine of Talos in White River Gorge, but only after you've approached the shrine. He is carrying out his orders from Elenwen to hunt down any "heretics" at the shrine.

Name: Agrane Peryval
description: Agrane Peryval is a Breton merchant who can be found at his campsite north of the Windward Ruins, just outside Dawnstar. You will be directed to him as part of the related quest, although you do not need to purchase anything from him.

Name: Alain Dufont
description: Alain Dufont is a Breton bandit leader residing in Raldbthar.
canonical_lines: A joke? Alain Dufont... a joke? I am a king on my throne, and you, my friend... you will die slowly, and painfully. | Well. You must have all those annoying gods on your side to have made it this far, whoever you are. Even I have to admit, that's pretty impressive. | I don't know how you got this far, but you'll go no farther | Hey! You're the one who killed Alain Dufont, up in Raldbthar. Oh yeah, word about that got around. Man was a piece of bandit trash, is what I hear. | That hammer... Why that's Aegisbane, heirloom of Clan Shatter-Shield! Last I heard, it was stolen by a couple of swindlers. Alain and... Muiri. Yeah. | Muiri? Muiri? So, what, you're the cow's champion? Oh, now that is rich. Well then, champion, let's get this over with.

Name: Alea Quintus
description: Alea Quintus, a Nord warrior, is one of the three people that may be selected from and killed to gain entry into the Dark Brotherhood during the related quest. She is the mother of six children.
canonical_lines: I'm a woman living in Skyrim with six children and no husband. I don't have the time or patience to be 'nice.' Do some people look down on me? Have I made some enemies? You're damn right. | I don't have time for this nonsense. I've got a home to keep and children to feed. Now let me out of here! | Get these things off of me! | By the gods, when I get out of here you're dead! You hear me? Dead! | Aggghh! Re...lease me! | None of your damned business who I am! If you're going to kill me, just do it already! As Mara is my witness, if I didn't have this damned hood on right now I would spit right in your face...

Name: Amaund Motierre
description: Amaund Motierre is a Breton of questionable background and employment, first encountered within Volunruud with his bodyguard Rexus. He plays a major role in the Dark Brotherhood questline, during which he hires them to assassinate the Emperor.
canonical_lines: I performed the Black Sacrament, contacted you people, because I thought you guaranteed discretion. Is this no longer so? | You think I don't know that? If anyone learned of this meeting, my corpse would swing over Solitude for a decade! But what I ask of you... it must be done. There is too much at stake. | Oh, Rexus is no mere servant. He has been with the Motierre family since I was a child. I trust the man with my life. | What is it? I said I didn't wish to... be disturbed. | Ah, yes, I can imagine you'd want to settle that score. Last I heard he was at the Solitude Docks, conducting the Emperor's departure. | Well, I don't know. It's in the Solitude Inlet - that's the channel just north of the docks. I suppose you should go to the docks and... swim?

Name: Angi
description: Angi is a Nord ranger, and from what little information she gives, is also an outlaw. She lives in her camp, which she states she built, and can be found south of Falkreath, high upon a mountain ridge.
canonical_lines: Name's Angi and if you try anything stupid I won't hesitate to put an arrow in your head. | Sorry, a girl can't be too careful out here. Like I said, name's Angi and I've been living out here for a couple of years now. | Great job hitting those targets. You definitely surprised me with your speed and composure. | It's not often I get visitors out here. You lost, stranger? | I moved here from Helgen after my family was killed. At the time I couldn't stand to be around anyone. They all felt sorry for me and I didn't want them to. It was my problem, not theirs. | Two Imperial drunks who thought they were above the law.

Name: Anise
description: Anise is an elderly conjurer living in Anise's Cabin. She appears to be a lonely alchemist, with several ingredients, some uncommon, lying around her small home.
canonical_lines: Fool! None may know my secret! | I'm just a poor old woman, dear. No need to trouble yourself with me. | I get so lonely out here. | It's tough, just scraping by out here. But I make do. | It's so nice to have a visitor.

Name: Anska
description: Anska is a Nord mage that is found in the first room of High Gate Ruins and initiates the quest A Scroll For Anska. She believes her family's blood can be traced all the way back to Ysgramor himself, but requires a special scroll contained in the ruins in order to prove it.
canonical_lines: I'm Anska. Are you here to help? | I've finally located Vokun's crypt! The scroll I'm looking for just has to be here. | Maybe you could help find it, I just know it's in here. | Some old priest buried here long ago. I've been searching for his tomb for a few years now. | If Vokun is as powerful as I think, I may need a little help um ... dealing ...with him. | Oh alright. Well I'll be here for a bit if you change your mind.

Name: Aranea Ienith
description: Aranea Ienith is a Dark Elf elemental mage and a worshipper of Azura. She can be found praying at the Shrine of Azura and will task you with finding Nelacar, whom she says holds the power of the stars.
canonical_lines: No harm shall come to me, for I live under Azura's wisdom. Her foresight protects me. Her insight sustains me. | There is no one else, but very well. I cannot force you to accept your destiny. | Azura's Star! I knew the Lady of Twilight had sent you for a reason. Hand it over to me. I will ask Azura to restore the Star to its original purity. | I understand. Speaking to a goddess is overwhelming for many. Return when you're prepared. | Are you ready for me to show Azura her Star and receive her wisdom? | I will commune with Azura.

Name: Aringoth
description: Aringoth is the Altmer owner of Goldenglow Estate, a bee farm outside of Riften which used to supply honey to the Black-Briar Meadery. The Thieves Guild made sure the operations ran smoothly and would extort considerable payment from Aringoth.
canonical_lines: Worthless mercenaries. I didn't think Maven or Mercer would allow me to get away with this, but I had little choice. | I can't. If I do, I may as well cut my own throat. | Fine. Take it! Once the new owner finds out I gave in, I'm as good as dead anyway. | I don't believe you. That's not your way. | I've already said too much. I gave you what you came here for, now go. Leave me in peace. | No! I'm not about to let you ruin everything I've worked so hard for!

Name: Arondil
description: Arondil is a High Elf conjurer, necromancer, and necrophile. He originally lived in Dawnstar, where he was studying techniques for reanimating the dead, and often spent time imagining secret encounters between himself and some of the local girls.
canonical_lines: What? An intruder? Attack, my lovelies! | Ah, another plaything for my collection. | What's happening? No! Leave me alone!

Name: Arvel the Swift
description: Arvel the Swift is a Dark Elf thief who stole a unique golden claw from the Riverwood Trader in Riverwood, and then retreated to Bleak Falls Barrow. You might be tasked with recovering the golden claw from him by the owner of the shop in question, or you might be tasked with finding the owner of the claw, if found by other means.
canonical_lines: Is... is someone coming? Is that you Harknir? Bjorn? Soling? I know I ran ahead with the claw, but I need help! You. Over here! | Get me out of here! | Don't leave me, for Arkay's sake! | Help me! Help! | Help me out of here! | Get me down. Get me down!

Name: Asta
description: Asta is a Nord worshipper of Kynareth who walks around in Eldergleam Sanctuary. She wears clothes and a pair of boots, and is equipped with a leveled dagger and a leveled bow with leveled arrows, all of which may be up to elven in quality.
canonical_lines: Yes, my friend. Though no one has been able to get close to her for as long as I can remember. | Oh, I don't believe those rumors, my friend. Besides, who would ever want to harm such... Wait, it can't be. | The rumors were true! You carry the one weapon Eldergleam fears - Nettlebane. I beg of you, don't harm the tree! Nothing good can come of it. | The rumors were true... I beg of you, don't harm the tree! Nothing good can come of it. | Oh, I don't believe those rumors, my friend. Besides, who would ever want to harm such beauty? | You are in Eldergleam Sanctuary - just a small glimpse of what beauty Kynareth has to offer. Wonderful place, isn't it?

Name: Bashnag
description: Bashnag, an Orc conjurer, is the leader of the spellsword coven residing in Southfringe Sanctum. He cast Selveni Nethri out of his circle of mages, cursed and chased her into a spider web, giving you the opportunity to save her as part of a miscellaneous quest.

Name: Beem-Ja
description: Beem-Ja is an Argonian sorcerer who sits at a small make-shift campsite just outside of Ironbind Barrow alongside his adventuring partner, the Redguard Salma.
canonical_lines: I grow tired of debating this. If Miss Salma insists on this folly, so be it. | I admit, there is strength in numbers. Perhaps between us... | Don't rush ahead. This is a trap if I ever saw one. | How can you just sit here and wait? We should be in there! | We must gather our strength. Who knows what's inside? | Treasure, that's what! Get off your scaly rump and let's go.

Name: Brandish
description: Brandish is a Breton bandit wizard who resides in the library of Fort Neugrad while it is occupied by bandits. Because of his involvement outlined in the Bandit Chief's journal, he is in the Fort Neugrad library most of the time.

Name: The Caller
description: The Caller, a High Elf elemental mage, is the leader of a band of mages in Fellglow Keep. Unlike the rest of her group throughout the dungeon, she will not outright attack you on sight.
canonical_lines: So, you're the one who barged into my home and laid waste to my projects. How nice to meet you. | Names no longer matter. You may refer to me as The Caller. Now, do you have a reason for making such a mess? | An arrangement? After you've destroyed so much? Fine. Leave me the elf. You may go with your books. | I'm afraid you don't have anything worth trading. Now, you can go back to your College and leave me be, or I can kill you. Your choice. | Fine. Take them and be gone. Never return here, or else you'll face my full wrath. | Are you attempting to threaten me? After I've been so hospitable? Well, then you won't be leaving here at all.

Name: Captain Hargar
description: Captain Hargar is the Nord leader of the Blackblood Marauders residing in the caved-in Broken Oar Grotto. He wears leather armor with matching leather boots.

Name: Captain Valmir (Imperial)
description: Captain Valmir is a High Elf who claims to be an officer of either the Stormcloaks or the Imperial Legion depending on which faction you have joined. He is found at the campsite in the courtyard of the ruined fortress of Forelhost.
canonical_lines: You there! As an officer of the Imperial Legion, I require your assistance to complete my mission. | The General has sent me to obtain a powerful weapon for the war effort. This was the last great bastion of the Dragon Cult, and their leader's mask was reported to be quite powerful. | Me? No, I'm too important to the war effort to risk life and limb in there... Besides, that's what I'm paying you for. | Are you going to help me with my mission? I need someone very capable. | Wait, it's haunted? I don't like ghosts... let me think about this for a minute... Wait... who in the blazes is this? | Oh! Um, he he... Hold on... I... I can explain...

Name: Champion of Boethiah
description: The Champion of Boethiah is a Dark Elf residing in Knifepoint Ridge. Killing him is the final challenge in Boethiah's Calling.
canonical_lines: The Prince of Plots usually gets what she wants. I'm surprised I'm not dead already. She must have had some reason to keep me alive so long. | A man who feels no fear has no heart. I know fear. But it does not control me. If you desire to fight me, then let's get this over with. | I told you. I'm done with all that. There's enough blood on these hands. I'm interested in creating things now. | That was a long time ago.

Name: Christer
description: Christer is a Nord who is searching for his wife, Fjola. He believes her to be a hostage in the Mistwatch bandit stronghold, and offers a reward if she can be rescued.
canonical_lines: Please, stranger! I need your help! | Stendarr's mercy - you aren't one of them. Please, you've got to help me! | It's my wife, Fjola! I think she's being held in this tower. | Honestly? I have no idea. But I've looked all over and the kidnappings here started around when she disappeared. So I have to hope... | Until you can find out whether Fjola is here there's nothing I care discuss. | What? My Fjola would never... You monster! I'll kill you for this!

Name: Deekus
description: Deekus is an Argonian assassin who resides at a campsite on the beach near Hela's Folly. He is a target for assassination in a Dark Brotherhood contract.
canonical_lines: You'll have to catch me first! | Go away! I don't know who you are, but this is my spot! Whatever's on that ship is mine! | What? Why? I don't understand... I have done nothing to wrong you. Please, mercy! | Go away! This is my wreck! Mine! | Hrm. You go find your own wreck. This one's mine. | He's an Argonian layabout, likes to scavenge shipwrecks. My guess is he'll run if threatened. Or swim, if given the chance.

Name: Drelas
description: Drelas is a Dark Elf elemental mage who lives alone in his cottage south of Morthal. He is not overly prone to conversation; if you decide to enter his cottage, he will attack with powerful magic and a random leveled dagger (up to glass quality).

Name: Ebony Warrior
canonical_lines: When next we meet, it will be at my last vigil. | Show me you are the hero they say you are! | I am the Ebony Warrior! | Kill me already! | Hit me harder! | You are the one.

Name: Eisa Blackthorn
description: Eisa Blackthorn is a Nord bandit living in Skyrim. After a year in Cidhna Mine she became a member of the White River Gang, a group of bandits in White River Watch led by Hajvarr Iron-Hand.
canonical_lines: Who in Dagon's name are you? Speak, or I'll cut you down where you stand. | The girl? Now there was a fighter. If I didn't know better, I'd say she was a Forsworn woman. | Damn it, not now! | There she is! | Hmph. Suit yourself. | Hey, remember that girl, Eisa? The one who sliced open that pickpocket they threw in here?

Name: Estormo
description: Estormo is a Thalmor agent reporting to Ancano. He will confront you at the end of Labyrinthian during the related quest.
canonical_lines: I am afraid you do. | You fool, you don't stand a chance.

Name: Fultheim the Fearless
description: Fultheim the Fearless is one of the three hostages in the With Friends Like These... quest.
canonical_lines: My name is Fultheim. I'm a soldier. Well, mercenary, really. You know, a... a sellsword. I've lived in Skyrim all my life. That's all! I'm a nobody, really. So can't you just let me go? | Oh ho. The whimpering Nord, eh? Yes, yes, I can see how you'd come to that conclusion. Interesting choice. | What did I do? Please, whatever it is, I'm sorry. | I... I can hear you talking out there. Please, let me go. I've done nothing to you. | Is this about that raid last week? I told Holgrim there was no honor in killing sleeping men, but he wouldn't listen! It wasn't my fault, I swear! | I'm just a soldier. Killing is my job! Surely you can't fault a man for doing his job?

Name: Gallus
canonical_lines: I don't recognize you, but I sense that you're one of us. Who are you? | The last of the Nightingale Sentinels, I'm afraid. I've defended the Sepulcher alone for what seems like an eternity. | We were betrayed by one of our own kind. In fact, I'm to blame for what's happened here. | I was blinded. Blinded by dark treachery masquerading as friendship. Perhaps if I had been more vigilant, then Mercer Frey wouldn't have lured me to my fate and stolen the Skeleton Key. | I haven't heard that name in a long time. How do you know of me? | The Key! You have the Skeleton Key! I never thought I'd see it again. And Mercer Frey?

Name: Gavros Plinius
description: Gavros Plinius, an Imperial sorcerer, is a member of the order of the Synod, and can be found upon entering Mzulft during Revealing the Unseen.
canonical_lines: Crystal.... gone... [coughing] Find... Paratus... in Oculory...

Name: Geirlund
description: Geirlund is a Nord warrior who will be called upon by Avulstein Gray-Mane to help rescue his missing brother from the Thalmor.
canonical_lines: I owe Thorald my life. Helping to save him is the least I can do. | No one should ever be left to the Thalmor.

Name: Ghunzul
description: Ghunzul, an Orc bandit, is the leader of the bandits in Cracked Tusk Keep. He is the 8th of his family line to bear the blade shards of Mehrunes' Razor.
canonical_lines: Looking for the blade? You aren't the first!

Name: Golldir
description: Golldir is a Nord warrior found outside Hillgrund's Tomb. He will appeal to you for help in stopping a necromancer, Vals Veran, from defiling his dead ancestors.
canonical_lines: No! Aunt Agna! Talos, why didn't I go in with her? | Ah! Oh, by Kyne you startled me. | Ah! Oh, by Kyne you startled me. There's a necromancer around here so watch yourself. | Can you help me? He's in the tomb doing Gods know what with my dead relatives. | Fine, but I've locked the door so don't think you're getting in there without me. | Great! I'll unlock the door and meet you inside, then you can lead the way.

Name: Hajvarr Iron-Hand
description: Hajvarr Iron-Hand is a Nord bandit and the leader of a group of bandits in White River Watch. He can be found at White River Outlook, a zone outside the cave, higher up the mountain.
canonical_lines: Got keen eyes? Might see nasty old Hajvarr up on White River Watch. Piece of work. Jarl should just run him out and have done with it. | Careful if you cross the river to the east. Old Hajvarr Iron-Hand and his brigands are holed up in that cave, White River Watch.

Name: Haldyn
description: Haldyn is a Redguard elemental mage who can be found on the island of Japhet's Folly, far northeast of Winterhold. He is the leader of a group of pirates called the Blood Horkers, who have been harassing ships in the Sea of Ghosts.

Name: Hrodulf
description: Hrodulf is a dead Nord farmer found along the coast of Solstheim near a boat south of his old house. He was presumably killed by the burnt spriggan standing over his body.

Name: Hunter
description: Hunters are friendly people (Nord, Imperial, Redguard, or Wood Elf) who can be found in the wild, stalking and attacking wildlife such as elk. They will also help kill any wildlife you are attacking.
canonical_lines: It's not like my poaching is hurting anyone. The Jarl can hardly eat every deer now can he? | I've been hunting and fishing in these parts for years. | Great! Thanks! Bastard stole from me. I'll catch him though! | Yes! How'd you get this? Never mind, here. It's not much, but something. I'm going to track down that thief and murder him! | Well, if you do, grab him and yell. Bastard stole from me. | There's enough for all of us if you aren't greedy.

Name: Illia
description: Illia is an Imperial elemental mage who lives in the Darklight Tower along with her mother, witches, and hagravens. Her mother plans to become a hagraven, but she needs a human sacrifice for this.
canonical_lines: By the gods! I know this looks bad. Let me explain... | I called it home, now I know that was a mistake. I am, or was part of a coven serving the Hagravens that live here. So was she. | I didn't want to, but she attacked to try and keep me from leaving. I just can't be a part of this place any more! The things we do here - evil, evil things. No more! | Good. Follow me. We have to fight our way up. I don't think anyone else here is about to have a change of heart. | Then I must do this alone. | Locked. Damn! One of the hags nearby will have the key. You'll have to take it from here. I'll keep watch here - unless you can pick the lock.

Name: J'darr
description: J'darr, a Khajiit bandit, is a skooma addict found in the Alftand Glacial Ruins. He was a member of a stranded expedition, along with his brother J'zhar, and is one of the last surviving members of the expedition.
canonical_lines: What? Who is this, Brother? Another of the smooth skins looking for food? But this one wasn't trapped with us... No... No! You must be the one who took my skooma!

Name: Jiub
description: Jiub is a Dark Elf scout whose soul is trapped in the Soul Cairn. He prefers his long title, "Saint Jiub the Eradicator of the Winged Menace", which he received after he eradicated Cliff Racers from Vvardenfell.
canonical_lines: I'm still hard at work on the second volume of my epic. | I hope you've read the first volume of my epic by now. | I miss my homeland, but I can't say that I miss all the noise! | When you get back to Tamriel, let them know I still exist. | Now, where was I... | Only thirty more pages and my next volume will be complete.

Name: Katria
description: Katria is a Nord spirit who is encountered at the beginning of Arkngthamz. She can initially be heard pleading you to leave the area, and after a while will appear and warn you of the dangers ahead.
canonical_lines: The name's Katria. I am - was - an adventurer. Raided ruins like this for nigh on twenty years. I was on the trail of something big. It led me here, and... I didn't make it. | Hmph... maybe so. Then again, I thought I could, too. | I'm not going to talk you out of it, am I? I know, I know. I was just like you, once. Well, if you want to reach the summit, you're going to need some help. You... want a hand? | It wasn't always like this. Best-preserved dwarven city I'd ever laid eyes on. And then... the earthquake hit. Now... you'd be lucky to find a single room intact. | I... fell. When the earthquake hit. The ground just... opened up. Even so, I almost made it... another foot or two to the side, and the water would have broken my fall. But... nothing I could do. | ...this is where I ended up. It was... quite the fall. Grab my journal, would you? We're going to need it.

Name: Kesh the Clean
description: Kesh the Clean, a Khajiit spellsword, is a worshipper of Peryite who can be found at the Shrine to Peryite. If you are at least level ten, he will give you the list of items you need in order to speak with Peryite, and thus begin the Daedric quest The Only Cure.
canonical_lines: Kesh could tell you more. I just want out of Skyrim as quickly as possible. | I worship Peryite, yes, because sometimes the world can only be cleansed by disease. | Yes, the incense. Fetch for me a deathbell flower, one silver ingot, a flawless ruby, and some vampire dust. Then I will show you how. | Ah, a wanderer, yes? No? Pilgrim, perhaps? come to commune with Peryite, Taskmaster and blighted Lord? | Ah, no. Don't think you've got the stuff. Come back when you've seen a bit more in life, perhaps. | Ah, have you? Let Kesh have them.

Name: Knight-Paladin Gelebor
description: Gelebor is a Knight-Paladin of Auri-El and one of the last remaining Snow Elves. He can be found in Darkfall Cave guarding the wayshrine.
canonical_lines: I am Knight-Paladin Gelebor. Welcome to the Great Chantry of Auri-El. | I prefer snow elf. The name Falmer usually holds a negative meaning to most travelers. Those twisted creatures you call Falmer, I call the Betrayed. | Of course. You're here for Auriel's Bow. Why else would you be here? I can help you get it, but first I must have your assistance. | Absolutely. You could turn around and travel back from wherever you started empty handed, or you could assist me. | I need you to kill Arch-Curate Vyrthur... my brother. | He's alive. I've seen him. But something's wrong. He never looks as though he's in pain or under duress. He just... stands there and watches, as though waiting.

Name: Kornalus
description: Kornalus Frey is a High Elf warlock who can be found in the ruined fort of Harmugstahl, conducting disturbing experiments on the unfortunate frostbite spiders residing there.
canonical_lines: Your corpse will feed my spiders for weeks. Now die, you fool! | Perhaps some more Glow Dust in the next batch of potions. That should increase their resistance. | Let's see if this works... | No, but that won't account for the size issue. Blast, if only so many of these creatures hadn't escaped. | What? How did you get this far? | What? No! Get back in your cage!

Name: Krev the Skinner
description: Krev the Skinner is the leader of the group of Silver Hand who make Gallows Rock their home. Krev only appears once the quest The Silver Hand has been started.

Name: Kyr
description: Kyr was a Nord bandit in Hjaalmarch. He was the leader of a group of bandits holed up in Frostmere Crypt however they were going through a rough patch with too few passing caravans to raid.
canonical_lines: *Gasp* Finally, someone came!... I... *coughs* The cat... *gasp* Ra'jiir... ambushed me. He's trying to take the sword back! I... can't... *gasp*

Name: Larina
description: Larina is an Imperial in Hob's Fall Cave. She is imprisoned in a cage on the ledge in the first room you enter.
canonical_lines: You have to help me, they are going to kill me! | You can't just leave me here! | Is there someone out there?

Name: Logrolf the Willful
description: Logrolf the Willful is an elderly priest of Boethiah who has deliberately performed Boethiah sacraments at the altar of Boethiah's archenemy and the Daedric Prince of Domination, Molag Bal.
canonical_lines: You? A servant of the King of Corruption? Has the beast's standards fallen so far? Tell me another one. | Ah, freedom. Now get out of my way. I have a task to attend to. | I want the priest who did this to bend his knee and give me his soul. | You there. Are you here to kill me? Slay the mighty Logrolf while he sits tied and helpless? | Rescue? No one knew where I was, when I was taken. Who sent you? | The Dark Mistress? She sent you? Wait. Molag Bal's altar. Of course. I have to get to Markarth at once. Cut me loose.

Name: Lokil
description: Lokil is a Nord vampire found in Dimhollow Crypt, particularly in the Dimhollow Cavern section which is inaccessible before Awakening. He will be interrogating Vigilant Adalvald about how to release the artifact sealed within Dimhollow.
canonical_lines: I'll never tell you anything, vampire. My oath to Stendarr is stronger than any suffering you can inflict on me. | I believe you, Vigilant. And I don't think you even know what you've found here. | I never forget who my friends are. Or my enemies. | I wish Lokil would hurry it up. I have half a mind to return to the castle and tell Harkon what a fool he's entrusted this mission to. | And I have half a mind to tell Lokil of your disloyalty. | So go and meet your beloved Stendarr.

Name: Lu'ah Al-Skaven
description: Lu'ah Al-Skaven is a Redguard conjurer in Ansilvund whose husband, Saeel, died for the Empire in the retaking of the Imperial City from the Aldmeri Dominion.
canonical_lines: They burned his body before I could raise him... it should have been returned to me... You will not stop me from killing those who wage this pointless war! | I am Lu'ah Al-Skaven. Who are you to disrupt my work? Begone, or I will add you to my army of the dead! | I shall have vengeance for the death of my husband. Rise! | I could not raise him, but I will raise an army to avenge his defilement! | Rise from your graves to defeat this worm

Name: Ma'zaka
description: Ma'zaka is a Khajiit citizen who tends the Solitude Lighthouse. He was a sailor in his earlier years, and looks after the lighthouse in his retirement.
canonical_lines: Oh my, old Ma'zaka has a visitor! | Get out of here or I'll call the guards! | You're the one described to me. | What brings you all the way out here? | Oh, for the salt spray, the of the mast, and the clash of sabers. Those were the days... | Hey! What're you doing in here?

Name: Madman
description: The Madman is a Nord bandit found in the wilds of Solstheim. He has apparently been driven mad from reading a Black Book, and will direct you towards it.
canonical_lines: I know things. Hidden things. Things you aren't supposed to know. | You don't believe me. No one does. They don't want to. I don't want to either. But I can't help it. They're in my head! | No! That's what I'm trying to say. The secrets. They're in there. In there deep. Can't get them out. They're in my head. | The Black Book. It shoved them in there. With black slick fingers. My fingers are too short. I can't get them out. | Oh no. I didn't find it. It found me. Here. I'll show you. See. Right there. But don't go there. You don't want these things in your head. You don't! | Luck won't help. I need something to pry these things out of my head. Why won't anyone listen to me? Listen to me! They're in my head!

Name: Malkoran
description: Malkoran is a Breton necromancer who resides in Meridia's Temple. You are tasked with removing him from the temple during the Daedric quest The Break of Dawn.

Name: Malkus
description: Malkus is an Orc vampire found in Forebears' Holdout. He ambushed the Moth Priest Dexion Evicus south of Dragon Bridge and took him to Forebears' Holdout in an attempt to enthrall him.
canonical_lines: The more you fight me, the more you will suffer, mortal. | I will resist you, monster. I must! | Yes, I can feel your defenses crumbling. You want it to end. You want to give in to me. Now, acknowledge me as your master! | How much longer can you keep this up, Moth Priest? Your mind was strong, but you're exhausted from the struggle. | Yes. Master.

Name: Maluril
description: Maluril is a Dark Elf scholar studying the Dwemer culture. He lives in his room in Mzinchaleft, along with many bandits who serve as his bodyguards.
canonical_lines: Death? Oh, there's death to be found here, to be sure. But not my own! | Who are you? Why are you here? Leave this place. I have much work to conduct.... | He's dangerous. Very dangerous. A rogue Dark Elf mage doing research into Dwarven artifacts should be both respected... and feared. Just not by you. | By the gods! What are you doing here? | The power of Mzinchaleft is mine! Begone from here!

Name: Malyn Varen
description: Malyn Varen is a Dark Elf sorcerer and former trainer at the College of Winterhold. He was pursuing research with soul gems, particularly the Daedric artifact Azura's Star, although his research had a secret personal agenda.
canonical_lines: Ah, my disciples have sent me a fresh soul. Good. I was getting... hungry. Wait. There's something different about you. | And who are you to challenge me? I have conquered mortality itself. I've spat in the eyes of the Daedric Lords. This is my realm now. I've sacrificed too much to let you take it from me! | This is my realm. I won't let you take it from me! | No. Not like this.

Name: Medresi Dran
description: Medresi Dran is a Dark Elf citizen found in Angarvunde. Frustrated that her team of excavators fled after stumbling upon draugr in the ruins, she offers to split the treasure inside if you will open the way to it, beginning a miscellaneous quest.
canonical_lines: Oh, I didn't see you there. | Of course I'm troubled. I'm on the verge of incredible wealth, but my cowardly work force ran at the first sign of danger. | Well, probably not like these. The ones in there are all still walking around. In any case, if I can't get past the creatures in that room, I can't recover the treasure. I need more manpower. | Say, that's not a bad idea. You look like you could handle yourself against these beasts. I'll tell you what. You help me get the treasure and I'll split it with you. Deal? | Then we've no time to lose. Follow me! | I don't have time to talk. Keep moving!

Name: Minorne
description: Minorne is a High Elf conjurer found in Ruunvald Temple. She charmed the temple's leader Moric Sidrey and the Vigilants within into worshipping her as a god.

Name: Moric Sidrey
description: Moric Sidrey is a Breton Vigilant of Stendarr. He led a group of Vigilants in Ruunvald and kept a journal series on the excavation, and later became charmed by Minorne.

Name: Morven Stroud
description: Morven Stroud is a Breton trader from High Rock whose soul was trapped before his death. He unknowingly brought fake ingredients to a coven of necromancers, who killed him, therefore trapping his soul in the Soul Cairn.
canonical_lines: You got it. Horse, wagon and all. Plopped here without so much as a word. I used to be one of the best traders in High Rock, you know. People would track me down just to see what I had for sale. | Odds and ends I've gathered over the years. Well, used to gather before all of this nonsense happened to me. Tell me what you're looking for and maybe we can make a deal... if you have the husks. | Brought some soul husks or are you wasting my time? | Sure, got plenty. What am I gonna' do with it? | Well, I've been so busy, I dunno. What are you, kidding me? | Of course I do. What do you want?

Name: Movarth Piquine
description: Movarth Piquine is a hostile vampire found inhabiting Movarth's Lair. According to the Jarl of Hjaalmarch, he was once long-thought to be dead, though events uncovered by the Dragonborn during the quest Laid to Rest reveal that not only was he still alive, he was also actively hatching a nefarious plot that could ensnare the whole town of Morthal.

Name: Naris the Wicked
description: Naris the Wicked is a High Elf mage located in Morvunskar who is using his magic to experiment on live subjects.
canonical_lines: They die too quickly. Maybe I'll try and hold off on the paralysis next time. Give me more of a moving target. Good practice. | Ah, the sweet smell of burnt flesh. Nothing better really.

Name: Nerien
description: Nerien, a High Elf sorcerer, is a member of the Psijic Order who appears in a vision during your investigation of the ancient ruin of Saarthal.

Name: Nimphaneth
description: Nimphaneth is a Wood Elf cannibal that appears at the table in Reachcliff Cave during the later stages of The Taste of Death quest. She cannot otherwise be found elsewhere in the world.
canonical_lines: I love this part of the meal. | You've brought us quite the meal. | It's an honor, Keeper of the Ring.

Name: Orchendor
description: Orchendor is a Wood Elf spellsword found at Bthardamz Arcanex. He is a former servant of Peryite and was asked by the Daedric prince to gather the survivors of a plague attack on Mundus and lead them to Bthardamz.

Name: Orthorn
description: Orthorn is a High Elf mage, who was an apprentice at the College of Winterhold. He left the college to join a group of mages at Fellglow Keep, taking some books he stole from the college library with him.
canonical_lines: Don't leave me here! | Please! Help me! | Please, please let me out of here! | You have to let me out. They're going to do something awful to me! | Yes, yes! Did Arch-Mage Aren send you? He sent you to rescue me, didn't he? | What? The bo... Oh. Oh dear. I shouldn't have taken them, I know! It was stupid. I was stupid. It won't happen again. Help me get out of here, and I'll help you find them. Please!

Name: Paratus Decimius
description: Paratus Decimius is a Synod mage working in the ruins of Mzulft.
canonical_lines: G...Gavros? Is that you? I'd almost given up hope. Let me get the door... | I don't know what sort of help you expect from me, but if you can actually find the crystal I'd certainly be grateful. | I am on official business of the Grand Council of the Synod. That's all you need to know. I might well ask the same of you, running around by yourself in this dangerous place. | Are you? Well. I'm afraid I can't help you with that. I need the crystal to do anything useful, and I don't have it. | You found... how in the world... That's it. That's it! I don't know who you are, but you may have just saved this little project... In fact, who are you, anyway? | Please, tell me you've found the crystal. I've no wish to die in this place.

Name: Ra'jirr
description: Ra'jirr is a Khajiit bandit living in Frostmere Crypt. He currently works under Kyr, and is the partner of Eisa Blackthorn.
canonical_lines: No! Noooooo!

Name: Revus Sarvani
description: Revus Sarvani, a Dark Elf merchant, is the owner of Dusty the silt strider, and can be found southwest of the Sun Stone, northwest of Tel Mithryn. He personally trained Dusty since she was a larva, and is staying with the now-elderly silt strider until she passes in peace.
canonical_lines: I'd like to purchase the Nix-Hound | From that look on your face I'm guessing you've never seen a Silt Strider before? | What would you like to know? | The blast from the volcano wiped most of them out. Found Dusty here in a small cave on Vvardenfell. Silt Strider cocoons are pretty tough.

Name: Rexus
description: Rexus, an Imperial warrior, is the personal bodyguard of Amaund Motierre.
canonical_lines: Well I'll be damned. We heard you were dead. Motierre's in the back room, if you've got business.

Name: Rigel Strong-Arm
description: Rigel Strong-Arm is a Nord bandit, and the leader of the bandits in Pinewatch. She owns a bedroom in Pinewatch Bandit's Sanctuary.

Name: Rhorlak
description: Rhorlak, a Nord bandit, is a compatriot of Rigel Strong-Arm living in Pinewatch. He wears a belted tunic along with a pair of boots.
canonical_lines: Endon's mold? I'm afraid you have the wrong place, my friend. You'll find no silversmiths here. I assure you, I have nothing of value. I'm nothing but a poor woodcutter just trying to make ends meet. | Well uh, Endon is a silversmith in Markarth, so I just assumed... | No harm done. Tell this Endon fellow I hope he finds what he's looking for. | Come on, what are trying to do? Insult me? | I thought I was clear when I said I didn't know. | So that's how it's going to be, huh? Fine. Take your best shot!

Name: Salma
description: Salma is a Redguard bandit found at a small make-shift campsite just outside the entrance to Ironbind Barrow together with her adventuring partner, the Argonian Beem-Ja. Their plan is to loot the barrow of any treasures, but the pair is concerned that they will be unable to fight their way through the tomb's numerous undead and traps on their own.
canonical_lines: I don't care what Beem says. It's high time we get in there and find our fortune. | Not without us, you aren't! I'm sure there's enough for everyone, after all. Come on, Beem-Ja. We're going. | Father never trusted Beem. I always thought he was just being overprotective. | I don't know. Beem-Ja has looked after me since I was knee-high to him. I need to rest, and then I think I'm going back to High Rock. | Look, I never needed treasure. My father owns land; our family is wealthy. I just wanted adventure. Not this. | Go on without me. I think I need to be alone for a while.

Name: Sanyon
description: Sanyon is a High Elf cannibal that appears at the table in Reachcliff Cave during the later stages of The Taste of Death quest. He cannot otherwise be found elsewhere in the world.
canonical_lines: Ah, the new disciple. I hear you have quite the appetite. | Praise to you, champion!

Name: Selveni Nethri
description: Selveni Nethri is a Dark Elf conjurer trapped inside Southfringe Sanctum. When you locate her stuck in a spider's web the miscellaneous quest starts to help her escape the cave.
canonical_lines: I left for a few days in Riften. When I came back Bashnag accused me of trying to sell him out to the Thalmor. I was cursed and chased off. | You! Please, help me! | Hurry, cut me down! | I want to get to my . all I have left. | Please, cut me down! | Bashnag cursed me. I can't cast a spell to save my life right now. I'll have to wait until the way out is safe.

Name: Septimus Signus
description: Septimus Signus is an elderly former scholar of the College of Winterhold, now living in seclusion in a remote outpost in the Sea of Ghosts. He is an expert on Elder Scroll lore and author of the book Ruminations on the Elder Scrolls.
canonical_lines: Dig, Dwemer, in the beyond. I'll know your lost unknown and rise to your depths. | How long will it be sung? My feet were set upon the rock but it turned to mud and drew me down. | I've seen enough to know their fabric. The warp of air, the weft of time. But no, it is not in my possession. | Oh, I am well. I will be well. Well to be within the will inside the walls. | I thought there were no secrets left to know. | Come closer, bask in my presence.

Name: Sild the Warlock
description: Sild the Warlock is a Nord elemental mage who can be found in his lair in Rannveig's Fast, a Nordic ruin located in the western mountain range just south of Morthal. He uses the ruin for his own sadistic experiments and has summoned numerous subjugated ghosts to protect his secret.
canonical_lines: I know you're up there. Go get the treasure. Doesn't it look pretty? | Ooooh...yes...yes. You've fallen for my trap! Greed makes a great lure. Odd you didn't die from the fall though. Most do. | Oh, and don't mind my assistant here. He may have seen better days, but he's still more help to me dead than he was alive. | Hhhmmm...maybe I put it over here. | Go get the treasure. Doesn't it look pretty? | Come on! You know you want what's in that chest. Just walk toward it!

Name: Silvia
description: Silvia is an elderly resident of Darklight Tower. She seeks to become a hagraven, a desire that her daughter Illia doesn't share.
canonical_lines: Daughter. Who is this you have brought me? | I found a willing subject for you. Payment has already been discussed, of course. | Splendid! Please take a seat on the chair behind me, would you? | I'll just prepare the subject now... | I can't let you do this, mother. You have to die now! | Greetings, mother.

Name: Sond
description: Sond is a Nord bandit who can be found in the Eldergleam Sanctuary. During the related quest, he along with Asta, will warn you not to desecrate the Eldergleam, otherwise you will face consequences brought about by Kynareth.
canonical_lines: Welcome to Eldergleam Sanctuary, my friend. If you have any questions, speak to Asta. | Don't come any closer. I don't want Kynareth to think I'm on your side. | Kynareth humbles us with her beauty.

Name: Stalleo
description: Stalleo is a Nord bandit wizard who is a member of the family which initially owned and lived in Treva's Watch in The Rift, which is now overrun and crawling with bandits. This happened when Stalleo and his two bodyguards were away to help out in the war, rendering them unable to defend their home from the invading bandits.
canonical_lines: Those bastards. I return from the war to find my home overrun with bandit filth. | He's a rogue mage who defected at the beginning of the war. I turned him in but apparently he escaped and now this. | I will take back my family's castle. | Finally, reinforcements have arrived. I was expecting more though, you'd better be good. | I wish we could offer more help, but our last attack went sour and we're all that is left. Good luck. | Fine then. The blood of my family is on your hands as well as Brurid's.

Name: Sulla Trebatius
description: Sulla Trebatius is a hostile Imperial spellsword located inside Alftand ruins. He was leading a group of adventurers into the ruin, hoping to be the first one to unearth its hidden treasures.
canonical_lines: Oh, of course you want me to leave. Just waiting for me to turn my back. So you can have all the glory for yourself! | Sulla, let's just get out of here. Hasn't there been enough death?

Name: Telrav
description: Telrav is an Imperial bandit archer who sits near a cart that has been destroyed on the road east of Ivarstead, and northwest of Sarethi Farm.
canonical_lines: Please help. I can pay you. | Bandits attacked and ransacked my cart. Can you help me? | Fine, leave me to die. | My camp is nearby in the ruins of Nilheim. Get me there safely and you'll be rewarded. | We're close now. I can see the camp. | Wait here. I'll be right back with your reward.

Name: Thorald Gray-Mane
description: Thorald Gray-Mane is a Nord and a strong supporter of the Stormcloaks. He was captured by the Imperial Legion after aiding the Stormcloaks in battle, after which the Thalmor took custody of him and started interrogating him in the dungeons of Northwatch Keep.
canonical_lines: I'm here! I knew I'd find you! | I never thought I'd see another friendly face again. We need to get to safety as soon as possible. Let's move. | I cannot thank you enough for rescuing me from this place. I suspect I'd never again see the light of day otherwise. But why would you risk your life for me, a stranger? | Of course. I should've known. Avulstein was behind this, wasn't he? | I've never known Avulstein to be that convincing! Where is the little scamp? | A wise decision, but I fear he may not be safe there anymore. They'll go looking for me, and Whiterun will be the first place they search.

Name: Thorek
description: Thorek is a Nord worshipper of Vaermina living in Nightcaller Temple. When Nightcaller Temple was attacked by an Orc war party intending to destroy the Skull of Corruption, the worshippers released the Miasma, a gas that put everyone to sleep.
canonical_lines: Then let it be done. Farewell, my brothers! | I no longer use that name. I'm Erandur, Priest of Mara. | You're a traitor. You left us to die and then ran before the Miasma took you. | No. I... I was scared. I wasn't ready to sleep. | Enough of your lies! I can't allow you to destroy the Skull, Priest of Mara. | Then you leave me no choice!

Name: Torkild
description: Torkild is a Nord werebear and the brother of Wulf Wild-Blood. Wulf will ask you to find Torkild, who will appear randomly while you are wandering Solstheim.
canonical_lines: In days past, my brother Torkild and I would share the hunt, but that was... long ago. | I wish I could tell you. He had a wild gleam in his eye, more than most. In my darkest times, I fear he fell in among the werebears of the glacier. | This is by his hand, for certain. It looks like I was right. He was taken in by that... Where did you find this? | I... I understand. That's not an existence I would wish on anyone. I hope you gave him a swift end. | Who... thirst for sky... All-Maker craves the night of sun. | He hears the underslake of blood dust!

Name: Ulfr the Blind
description: Ulfr the Blind is a Nord bandit sitting at a table in White River Watch. He guards the lower exit of the cave, quite a feat considering his blindness.
canonical_lines: Eh? Who's there? Rodulf, that you? | Boss was looking for you - said he'd be up at the summit. Better not keep him waiting. | Hey! Somebody get down here! Help! | Good luck out there. | ...Yeah. We can't have that rheumy-eyed fool as our watchman, even if he is Hajvarr's uncle. Time we dealt with both of them.

Name: Umana
description: Umana is a Redguard warrior found in the last chamber inside Alftand cathedral. Upon entering the room, she will speak to an Imperial soldier named Sulla Trebatius about leaving this cursed place.
canonical_lines: Oh, of course you want me to leave. Just waiting for me to turn my back. So you can have all the glory for yourself! | Sulla, let's just get out of here. Hasn't there been enough death?

Name: Usha
description: Usha is a dead Argonian citizen found north of Ashfallow Citadel behind a barred gate over the stream. By climbing the mountain east of the gate, you can make your way around to jump down into the wooden structure behind it.

Name: Valerica
description: Valerica is a Nord vampire, wife to Lord Harkon and mother of Serana. She is found just outside the entrance of the Boneyard in the Soul Cairn when you go looking for her to find an Elder Scroll to be used by Lord Harkon.
canonical_lines: So how has it come to pass that a vampire hunter is in the company of my daughter? It pains me to think you'd travel with Serana under the guise of her protector in an effort to hunt me down. | I see. You're simply here to stop the Tyranny of the Sun, despite the cost to Serana. Nothing else matters. | So how has it come to pass that a vampire of mixed blood is in the company of my daughter? | Now you're beginning to see why I wanted to protect Serana, and why I've kept the other Elder Scroll as far from her as possible. | It was expected of her, just as it was expected of me. Being selected as an offering to Molag Bal is an honor. She wouldn't have dared turn her back on that. | If you believe that, then you're a bigger fool than I originally suspected. Don't you think I weighed that option before I enacted my plans?

Name: Vanik
description: Vanik is a Nord member of the Dawnguard found in Forebears' Holdout protecting the Moth Priest Dexion Evicus.
canonical_lines: I don't know, maybe. Won't know until we get him out of there. | I'm working on it, now give me some silence so I can think. | Those vampires put up a hell of a fight. You think they turned him? | How do we do that?

Name: Vasha
description: Vasha, a Khajiit warrior, is one of the three hostages in the With Friends Like These... quest.
canonical_lines: Ah, sweet freedom. Now that's more like it. You have my thanks, stranger. | Tell you what. You release me, and I promise my associates won't hunt you down like an animal and butcher you in the street. It's a win-win. | Whoever this is, clearly we got off on the wrong foot. Ah, but no worries. This is not the first time I have been bagged and dragged. | Hello? Hello? Ah, I know you're listening. | A man in my position makes lots of enemies. But what is a life-threatening situation if not an opportunity for mutual benefit? Hmmm? | You'll let me go. I know you will. This is all just part of the game we play...

Name: Venarus Vulpin
description: Venarus Vulpin is an Imperial vampire in Redwater Spring. He moved to Skyrim from Summerset Isle in search of the "Bloodspring of Lengeir's Feast", a fabled source of power for vampires that was believed to be in a ruin buried during the Second Era.

Name: Veren Duleri
description: Veren Duleri is a Dark Elf mage and a worshipper of Vaermina living in Nightcaller Temple. When Nightcaller Temple was attacked by an Orc war party intending to destroy the Skull of Corruption, the worshippers released the Miasma, a gas that put everyone to sleep.
canonical_lines: Then let it be done. Farewell, my brothers! | I no longer use that name. I'm Erandur, Priest of Mara. | You're a traitor. You left us to die and then ran before the Miasma took you. | No. I... I was scared. I wasn't ready to sleep. | Enough of your lies! I can't allow you to destroy the Skull, Priest of Mara. | Then you leave me no choice!

Name: Vidrald
description: Vidrald is a Nord warrior who will be called upon by Avulstein Gray-Mane to help rescue his missing brother from the Thalmor.
canonical_lines: I pledged to aid Avulstein and Thorald a long time ago. There's nothing that could keep me from helping them now. | The Thalmor need to be taught a lesson.

Name: Vighar
description: Vighar is a hostile elderly vampire who inhabits Bloodlet Throne. You are sent to kill him by his descendant, Dengeir of Stuhn, and he will only spawn while on that quest.
canonical_lines: It is no matter, this fool will be the next act of the show.

Name: Vigilant Adalvald
description: Vigilant Adalvald is a Nord Vigilant of Stendarr, first mentioned by Vigilant Tolan during the first Dawnguard quest. He is later found in Dimhollow Crypt on your first mission as a member of the Dawnguard.
canonical_lines: I'll never tell you anything, vampire. My oath to Stendarr is stronger than any suffering you can inflict on me. | I believe you, Vigilant. And I don't think you even know what you've found here. | I never forget who my friends are. Or my enemies. | So go and meet your beloved Stendarr. | Are you sure that was wise, Lokil? He still might have told us something. | We haven't gotten anywhere ourselves with...

Name: Volk
description: Volk is a Nord Vigilant of Stendarr found in Ruunvald. He came there to help with the excavation after Moric Sidrey requested more assistance.

Name: Wizard
description: The Wizard is a Wood Elf who can be randomly encountered on Solstheim. He can initially be heard muttering to himself, "They said it couldn't be done.
canonical_lines: The book in my dream showed me... | It's working, I'm flying! I'm really flying! Hahahaha! | They said it was impossible. Ha! | They said it couldn't be done. They said it. They said it. But they were wrong! | There's nothing to worry about, nothing to worry about at all... | To touch the sky like a dragon...

Name: Wyndelius Gatharian
description: Wyndelius Gatharian is a Dark Elf bandit wizard inhabiting Shroud Hearth Barrow in search of the Sapphire Dragon Claw to gain access to Shroud Hearth Depths.
canonical_lines: Leave this place... Leave this place... | Leave... Leave... Leave...
